topReviews.Name: Rina Mehta
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Andheri West appeals to me because my interactions are practical and lively. I have great colleges nearby, simple metro access, corporate offices, etc. Weekends are spent at parks with family. Nearby, media offices employ me. Though I adore this location, parking problems and noise have to be addressed quickly.

topReviews.Name: Sunita Oak
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Andheri West offers strong demand and quick transactions. Since I see great metro, road and rail access, I make it a top priority. Families should benefit from it given schools and safety. I lead customers to beaches, shops, and cafes. I believe traffic bottlenecks and insufficient parking have to be fixed.

topReviews.Name: Sagar Agashe
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Owning flats here, I relish the busy ambiance. The incredible Link Road connectivity is my favourite feature. Every day for job, I use the Azad Nagar Metro station. My experiences are wonderful since my family feels secure close to Juhu beach. Fixing the waterlogging and the bad evening traffic are among my ideas.

topReviews.Name: Anandi Shinde
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Living here makes me really happy. For speedy travel, I would recommend using the Azad Nagar Metro. My residence is not far from Laxmi Industrial Estate headquarters. Bhavan's College and Kokilaben Hospital are fantastic. A weekend at Joey's Pizza is really appealing to me. I have to confess, the bad road potholes and waterlogging quite irritate me as well as other residents in this neighborhood.

topReviews.Name: Naresh Mhatre
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Most customers should be advised to choose Andheri West. Kokilaben Hospital and nearby excellent colleges are two key highlights. I point to media hubs and offices in Veera Desai and Lokhandwala. The locality gives the train, Metro Line 2A. I discuss pressing needs including road maintenance, traffic control, parking arrangements, and noise control.

topReviews.Name: Apeksha Patil
topReviews.PositiveDesc: I feel very pleased living today in Andheri West. Daily I like shops, food streets, beaches, and fast services. Often I travel via SV Road, Western Railway, Metro Line 2A, and buses. I enjoy evening café visits on Juhu Beach. I count on Kokilaben Hospital always. Traffic, noise, rent, parking, and crowds worry me.

topReviews.Name: Anuj
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Andheri West's buzzing, small life and simple access to everything I appreciated during my brief stay. Streets felt active but safe. My go-to weekend destinations were the Versova cafés and shopping lanes of Lokhandwala. For sunset strolls, I frequently drove to Juhu beach. DN Nagar metro, Metro Line 2A/7 corridors, Andheri railway, and Western Express Highway nearby provided for easy daily commutes. Many coworking facilities, corporate headquarters and studios abound around the neighborhood, thus job was nearby. There were several hospitals and clinics available, hence medical care was quick. Local markets and malls catered to daily needs. Neighbours were warm. My living was both secure and pleasant. One area requiring enhancement was daytime traffic and roadside parking control on major routes during rush hours.

topReviews.Name: Ankita
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Having been Andheri West resident, I like its easygoing atmosphere. My trip has been made so much easier due to the Mumbai Metro Line 2A; the mainline station and major roads mean I am never far from anywhere. Walking around the neighbourhood, particularly in areas like Lokhandwala and Versova, I feel secure with numerous schools, hospitals, and malls are nearby, which is really reassuring. The combination of chilled-beachy Versova evenings and the vibrant market shopping in the daytime is what appeals to me most. The only thing I would change is the drainage and road-condition under severe rains; the area copes with day-to-day very effectively but the monsoon may get sloppy.

topReviews.Name: Piyali
topReviews.PositiveDesc: Andheri West is highly suggested. With fast connections to Juhu and the airport, metro and suburban rail access, this western neighborhood provides premium living. Life is made easy by upscale eateries, exciting nightlife, boutique stores, good hospitals and reputable schools. The corporate and entertainment presence supports a high demand for rentals. Average rent is about ninety to one hundred rupees per square foot, whereas average sale price is roughly thirty-eight thousand five hundred rupees per square foot. Three to five percent gross yields are typical. Steady appreciation is driven by new amenities and redevelopment. One area to work on is preservation of seaside green belts and increased public parks. I support it among the best choices.

topReviews.Name: Amay
topReviews.PositiveDesc: See, I feel that Andheri West is arguably a perfect place to stay. There are multiple housing options here, while we also love hanging out at the Infiniti Mall nearby. Multiple restaurants, boutiques, malls, theatres, and other entertainment zones are nearby, which ensure a great lifestyle. Also, there are many reputed schools and healthcare centres nearby, while the Metro Line 1, railway station, and major roads make it a well-connected area as well. The SEEPZ and MIDC are also pretty accessible, while the airport is nearby. Apart from the poor drainage system, there’s a lot to like about this locality.

topReviews.Name: Rajeshwar
topReviews.PositiveDesc: If you want to stay in a glamorous neighbourhood, then Andheri West is definitely for you! I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here. There is the posh Lokhandwala zone and its bustling Lokhandwala Market, which is a wonderful place to shop and spend time. You can take the Mumbai Metro Line 1 and major roads like SV Road and WEH for your commute. Public transportation facilities, cafes, restaurants, pubs, and shopping malls everything you need is available at your fingertips. My only issue is the potholed roads in some stretches; it does not go well with such a premium locality.

topReviews.Name: Nikhil
topReviews.PositiveDesc: I start my day in Andheri West and like its busy, mid-town feel. Lokhandwala, Versova and Juhu are just around the corner so locals have shopping, cafes and beaches within easy drives. DN Nagar Metro and the Metro 2A, 7 corridor provide quick reliable connections throughout the western suburbs. The Western Express Highway and local transport make city and airport travel convenient. Andheri West is home to numerous offices, studios and shopping centers so jobs available. Schools, hospitals and malls are within walking distance. Tree-lined roads and tiny parks bring nature to congested streets. The prices are high but worth it by location and amenities. I would suggest Andheri West for professionals and families seeking city life. Two areas for improvement are congestion due to heavy traffic and parking demand.

topReviews.Name: John
topReviews.PositiveDesc: See, I really love living in Andheri West. I mean, the lifestyle that I get here is absolutely top-class! Who does not like the short drive to the Versova Beach from here? It’s just like 5-6 minutes from where I stay. Hence, it’s my everyday jogging spot in the morning. I also like doing some yoga on the beach, whenever I can. In the evenings, I often go there to hang out with my friends, taste the local street food, and basically watch the sunset. This is one of the biggest privileges of life, and of course, being able to stay within 20-25 minutes of the Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport is another privilege. I don’t have to worry about traffic jams and flight misses! That’s my takeaway, and the rest is all fine.

topReviews.Name: Sourav
topReviews.PositiveDesc: I've had my property in Andheri West for fifteen years now, and the active, central location is really unbeatable. The fantastic east-west connectivity via Metro Line 1 and heavy traffic roads such as Link Road and SV Road makes travelling just effortless. The whole locality is a bustling hotbed for the entertainment and IT sectors, offering massive professional potential right at our doorstep. With good schools and large malls such as Infinity, all facilities are easily accessible and the area is very secure. For our future quality of life, the principal change required is a lasting solution to the bad drainage system that unfortunately leads to waterlogging on major stretches during the wet monsoon.

topReviews.Name: Navrang
topReviews.PositiveDesc: I did like my time in Andheri West, although I moved out for certain personal reasons. The Andheri railway station is present here, while I used to access both the southern and northern parts of Mumbai from the locality. The Metro Line 1 station is also there now, while Line 2A will be helpful for linking to Dahisar East from DN Nagar. Both the SV Road and the WEH can be accessed from here, while the airport’s domestic and international terminals are also pretty nearby. So, connectivity-wise, it’s a dream locality to stay in. There are plenty of studios here, along with nightlife options, retail stores, malls like the Citi and Infinity Mall, and several top educational and healthcare institutions. Several parks and green zones are also here, along with access to the Versova Beach, which used to be my hangout spot. The only drawback is the heavy traffic and the potholed roads.

images.name: Master Plan Image 2
images.description:
This is Kolte Patil Serenova, located in Andheri West. The provided master plan doesn't specify the total land area, the exact number of units, or the number of towers, nor does it list project launch or completion dates.

Land Use & Density

The plan outlines distinct zones including two residential wings (Wing-A and Wing-B), extensive parking areas, and dedicated green spaces such as an Urban Forest and a Pet Park. Specific density figures, such as units per acre, are not indicated within this plan.

Connectivity & Access
  • The property is fronted by a 12.20 meter wide existing road.
  • Primary access points include an Entry & Exit Gate, a separate Pedestrian Gate, and an additional Exit Gate, all managed by a Watchman Cabin.
  • Internal vehicle circulation is facilitated by a 6.00 meter wide driveway and a 3.35 meter wide driveway.
  • The project is connected to Versova Road (0.1 km) and the Western Express Highway (4.0 km).
On-Site Features & Amenities
  • A Multi Purpose Court is available for recreational activities.
  • There's an Urban Forest and a dedicated Pet Park, providing green spaces and pet-friendly areas.
  • Seating Steps are provided for outdoor relaxation.
  • The property includes essential infrastructure such as a D.G. Set, a designated space for a Substation, and other services.
Key Dimensions & Figures
  • The main access road bordering the property is 12.20 meters wide.
  • Internal driveways measure 6.00 meters and 3.35 meters in width.
  • Access ramps are provided to reach both the 1st Podium and the Basement parking levels.
  • Multiple parking zones are distributed across the site.

_source.seoDescription:
Kolte Patil Serenova is an upscale residential development located in Versova, Andheri West, Mumbai. The project aims to provide a pristine coastal lifestyle with seamless city connectivity, an ideal proposition for professionals and modern families.

Spanning across 0.8 acres of perfectly planned plots, the project features 2 & 3 BHK homes with sizes ranging from 579 to 1093 sq. ft, including modern layouts, high-end finishes, and generous living spaces.

Each apartment at Kolte Patil Serenova is designed to increase natural light, ventilation, and uninterrupted ocean views to contribute to a healthy, energizing, and tranquil environment and ultimately a balanced comfort and contemporary urban living.

This is a thoughtfully planned residential development focused on bringing together greenery, open space and lifestyle amenities to create a lively, social, and inclusive community.

Backed by Kolte-Patil, a trusted name in Real Estate with over 30 years of excellence, Kolte-Patil has delivered 64 landmark projects and quality and excellence throughout Pune, Mumbai & Bengaluru.

The possession date is May 2029 as per RERA number PR1180002500850.

Enjoy a World of Amenities at Kolte Patil Serenova, Andheri West, Mumbai

  • Walk through the landscaped urban forest and soak in nature’s calm.
  • Enjoy quiet moments amid tree-lined surroundings designed for peace and privacy.
  • Take a refreshing swim in the half Olympic-size pool with a cozy deck.
  • Let little ones have endless fun in the safe toddler pool.
  • Stay active and healthy at the fully equipped, modern gymnasium.
  • Challenge friends in the pickleball court or enjoy indoor games anytime.
  • Celebrate special moments in the multipurpose hall for events and gatherings.
  • Find your balance with yoga or energize your body in the CrossFit zone.
  • Stay connected easily with the intercom facility for seamless communication.

Kolte Patil Serenova, Andheri West, Mumbai, means A Location That Connects to Everything Important

Andheri West offers vibrant city life, seamless connectivity, modern comforts and a thriving residential lifestyle.

Convenience:

  • Versova Metro Station- 0.1 km
  • Andheri Railway Station- 3.5 km
  • Western Express Highway- 4 km
  • Mumbai International Airport- 7.3 km

IT Hubs and Workplaces:

  • Laxmi Business Park, Maruti Business Park, Sardar Patel Technology Business Incubator
  • Lotus Corporate Park, NESCO IT Park, R Tech Park, IRIS Business Park

Social Infrastructure Highlights:

  • Education Center- Gyan Kendra Secondary School, Cresmonde World School, Louis Convent School
  • Shopping Center- Citi Mall, Infiniti Mall, Prime Mall, PVR Dynamix Mall
  • Hospitals- Patel Hospital, Nakshatra Multispeciality Hospital, Bellevue Multispeciality Hospital

developer.name: Kolte Patil Developers Ltd
developer.description:
Kolte Patil Developers Limited was founded two decades earlier and has been developing several landmark projects over a period of 25 years. Kolte Patil Builders is headquartered in Pune and is also listed on the NSE and BSE. The company is the largest developer in Pune and the portfolio of Kolte Patil properties include 1 crore sq. ft. of completed projects in Pune and Bangalore.

There are some premium redevelopment Kolte Patil projects present in Mumbai as well. The company has built residential, commercial and retail projects along with IT Parks and integrated townships. The company has a skilled management and leadership team and is known for its focus on sustainable real estate development.

Why Kolte Patil?

The underlying theme behind all Kolte Patil residential projects is the creation of contemporary spaces that perfectly blend in with their surroundings and are future-proof and aesthetically appealing alike. The company believes in values like innovation, honesty, transparency, reliability, sustainability and timely project delivery.

The company makes use of the latest and most contemporary technologies for developing projects and is also known for its environment friendly development outlook. The company aims at offering value for money propositions to its customers and bases its projects on deep customer insights. The company believes in 360 degree transparency, proper business ethics and corporate governance, efficient construction processes and systems and adherence to all necessary standards and regulations. The company has a You on Priority approach when it comes to serving customers and seeks to offer greater value for money on all customer investments.

Major Projects:

There are several landmark projects developed by the company till date and there are numerous Kolte Patil upcoming projects set to follow over the years as well. Here are some of the most iconic ones:

  • 24K Glitterati- This is a mega residential private complex located at Pimple Nilakh in Pune and this offers amazing views of the mountains. This project offers premium amenities and facilities to residents and a lot more
  • 24K Allura- Located at NIBM in Pune, this project is for the sophisticated aesthete who looks for sheer perfection at home itself. This project is an ultra luxury project with the finest amenities and awe inspiring project designs
  • Downtown- Located at Kharadi, this project offers premium amenities and other features while also offering a Manhattan-like ambience and vibe which is hugely enlivening and luxurious
  • Ivy Estate- This premium residential project is located at Wagholi and is the largest integrated township in the entire region. This project features a school, fitness centre and luxury villas and apartments alike

description.manualDesc:
Pranami Bliss is a residential project located in Andheri West, Mumbai. It is planned as a mid-sized residential community with two towers. The focus is on organized living and easy day-to-day comfort.

Andheri West is a well-known part of the city. Daily travel from this area is manageable for work and routine needs. Markets, schools, hospitals, and local services are close by. Public transport options are also easily available. This helps residents handle daily movement without much effort.

Pranami Bliss spreads over 0.41 acres of land and offers 1 and 2-BHK homes. Apartment sizes range from 384 sq ft to 610 sq ft. The project includes two towers and a total of 234 residential units. Despite the number of homes, the layout remains smooth and organized.

Homes are designed for everyday use. Room layouts are simple and easy to furnish. Windows allow natural light and airflow into the living spaces. The overall feel is practical and comfortable.

Pranami Bliss also provides amenities such as a gym and a jogging track for fitness. Badminton court, cricket, table tennis, snooker, and indoor games are also available to play different types of sports. With that, it also has a central green park and a senior citizen area for the elderly to come into contact with nature. These amenities provide comfort and leisure to the residents.

Pranami Bliss is developed by Pranami Group. The group brings over 22 years of experience in real estate. More than 500 families already live in their completed projects. This development reflects their focus on clear planning and reliable execution.

description.manualDesc:
Sunbeam Heights is a residential project. It is planned as a modern high-rise development.  The project focuses on organised living within a vertical setup. The overall design keeps daily comfort and movement in mind.

Andheri West is a well-established residential area. Daily travel for work, education, and routine needs is manageable. Local markets, healthcare centres, and services are easily accessible.  Public transport options help with smooth connectivity across the city.

Sunbeam Heights is developed on 0.92 acres of land. It offers 1, 2, and 3-bedroom homes. Apartment sizes range from 426 sq ft to 1005 sq ft.  The project includes a total of 322 residential units. The building rises to 37 floors. 

The tower has a clean and modern façade. Multiple lifts are planned to reduce waiting time. Ample parking space is provided for residents. Branded fixtures are used inside the homes. A grand entrance lobby marks the main entry.

Sunbeam Heights is developed by Sunbeam High Tech Developers. The developer focuses on residential projects. Their work reflects structured planning and steady execution. This project follows the same practical approach.

Amenities at Sunbeam Heights, Andheri West, Mumbai 

  • A swimming pool is planned for daily relaxation and leisure time.
  • Juice bar added for quick refreshments within the premises.
  • Walkway designed for calm morning and evening walks.
  • Kids’ play area planned for safe outdoor fun.
  • Indoor games zone for casual recreation at home.
  • Reflexology path created for relaxed walking routines.
  • Gym planned for regular fitness sessions.
  • A cricket simulator added for practice and indoor play.
  • Multipurpose hall designed for events and gatherings.
  • Podium garden planned as an open green space.
  • Library space created for quiet reading time.
  • Yoga room planned for calm daily practice.

Sunbeam Heights, Andheri West, Mumbai: Perfectly Connected and Smartly Placed

Andheri West offers vibrant city life, seamless connectivity, modern comforts, and a thriving residential lifestyle.

Convenience:

  • Versova Metro Station- 0.1 km
  • Andheri Railway Station- 3.5 km
  • Western Express Highway- 4 km
  • Mumbai International Airport- 7.3 km

IT Hubs and Workplaces:

Laxmi Business Park, Maruti Business Park, Sardar Patel Technology Business IncubatorLotus Corporate Park, NESCO IT Park, R Tech Park, IRIS Business Park

Social Infrastructure Highlights:

  • Education Centre- Gyan Kendra Secondary School, Cresmonde World School, Louis Convent School
  • Shopping Centre- Citi Mall, Infiniti Mall, Prime Mall, PVR Dynamix Mall
  • Hospitals- Patel Hospital, Nakshatra Multispeciality Hospital, Bellevue Multispeciality Hospital

Upcoming Infrastructure Near Sunbeam Heights, Andheri West, Mumbai

  • The fully operational Metro Line 2A (DN Nagar–Dahisar) now links western suburbs like never before. 
  • Add to that the Metro Lines 7 & 7A, the double-decker Andheri–Powai flyover, JVLR signal-free corridor, and the Metro–Airport link, and you’re looking at significantly reduced commute times; up to 30% faster travel, along with long-term growth benefits.

  • With a 29.2% property appreciation over the past decade and consistent rental demand, Andheri West continues to outperform. 
  • Low inventory, increasing remaking, and a central location make it ideal for both end-users and investors.

_source.seoDescription:
Adani Linkbay Residences is a premium residential address in the heart of Andheri West, Mumbai, a perfect blend of elevated living and unparalleled convenience. Architected by the leading architect of Hafeez Contractor.

Looking for that wow factor and a stunning elevation? Then Linkbay Residences is your answer. With an infinity rooftop pool, sky decks, and panoramic sea and city views, it is a vertical oasis right in most buzzing suburbs of Mumbai.

This integrated 2.5-acre development features an elegant mix of residences and retail, with shops with a starting size of 373 sq. ft. and 2, 3 and 4 bhk apartments ranging from 823 to 1887 sq. ft, for all who want to live life king-size, our big apartment sizes shall be a delight to you.

Vaastu complaint homes are Adani Linkbay Residences specialty, offering an increased influx of positivity and peace into your lives in your East-West facing apartments, also a large retail shopping arcade(1-acre) right around the corner, and all your daily necessities are at hand.

Backed by Adani Realty, a globally trusted and award-winning developer with over 24 million sq. ft. delivered and 61 million sq. ft. under development.

Enjoy a World of Amenities at Adani Linkbay Residences

  • 4181 sq. mtrs. Club House promises to deliver an unmatched experience.
  • Discover a tranquil escape in the serene central courtyard.
  • Unwind in the stunning infinity pool, offering breathtaking sea & city views from the rooftop.
  • 2508 sq. mtrs. Fitness and sports define your lifestyle.
  • Take a refreshing dip in the lavish swimming pool, while the little ones splash around in the kids pool.
  • Stay active in the fresh air at the open-to-sky sports arena.
  • Start your day with an energizing jog on a track surrounded by lush greenery.

Adani Linkbay Residences, Andheri West, Mumbai: Perfectly Connected and Smartly Placed

Step out and the best of the city is at your feet.

  • Adani Linkbay Residences is just minutes from Metro Lines 1 & 2A, with DN Nagar Metro Station and Andheri stations within easy reach.
  • Western Express Highway, JVLR, and Link Road provide excellent east–west and north–south movement.
  • You are only 7 km from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai Terminal 2.
  • You can also visit restaurants like Versova Social and The Little Easy.
  • Near DN Nagar in Andheri West, Mumbai, there is a place called Veera Desai Industrial Estate. Many factories and big storage buildings are there.
  • Just minutes away from popular places like Infiniti Mall and PVR City Mall.

Upcoming Infrastructure Near Adani Linkbay Residences, Andheri West, Mumbai

  • The fully operational Metro Line 2A (DN Nagar–Dahisar) now links western suburbs like never before.
  • Add to that the Metro Lines 7 & 7A, the double-decker Andheri–Powai flyover, JVLR signal-free corridor, and the Metro–Airport link, and you are looking at significantly reduced commute times; up to 30% faster travel, along with long-term growth benefits.

DN Nagar position within this infra web makes it one of the most promising investment pockets of Mumbai.

Adani Linkbay Residences, Andheri West, Mumbai: Smart Living, Smart Investment

  • With a 29.2% property appreciation over the past decade and consistent rental demand, Andheri West continues to outperform.
  • Low inventory, increasing remaking, and a central location make DN Nagar ideal for both end-users and investors.

*This data is derived by the Square Yards data intelligence team. This can change according to the market trends*

Adani Linkbay Residences offers a perfect blend of private luxury, world-class amenities, and a strategic location in Mumbai. Your home here is a smart investment and a lifestyle upgrade.

moderation.faq:
• Q: Where is Linkbay & how's the commute?

    Andheri West, New Link Road, opposite Lotus Business Park. Provides 4 min access to Infiniti Mall, 6 min to YRF Studios, 10 min to metro.

  • Q: What are the amenities?

    Infinity pool, steam room, sky gym, spa, amphitheatre, sports courts, indoor games, kids' play, senior/senior seating, sky library, café, multipurpose hall, etc.

  • Q: How are common areas & parking planned?

    Four-level basement + podium parking, grand 100,000 sq ft lobby, landscaped gardens, retail arcade separate from residential entry.

  • Q: What are the specifications?

    Italian marble in living, bamboo flooring in bedrooms, high-end fixtures, hidden wiring/plumbing, video intercom, motion-sensor lighting, stainless steel kitchens.

  • Q: Are there any metro stations near Adani Linkbay Residences?

    The DN Nagar Metro Station and Lower Oshiwara Metro Station are both within a 5-minute drive (approx. 550m to 1km) from the project.

  • Q: What are other residential projects near Adani Linkbay Residences?

    Nearby projects include Transcon Triumph, Runwal Elegante, Lodha Eternis, and Kalpataru Vivant.

  • Q: What makes Adani Linkbay Residences different from other projects in the same locality?

    It features an expansive 1-lakh sq. ft. grand connected lobby and a massive 45,000 sq. ft. clubhouse, offering a resort-like lifestyle in the heart of Andheri.

  • Q: What is the resale potential of Adani Linkbay Residences?

    Excellent potential due to its prime New Link Road location and high demand for luxury gated communities in Andheri West.

  • Q: What are the key landmarks near Adani Linkbay Residences?

    Major landmarks include Infiniti Mall, Fun Republic Mall, Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital, and JBCN International School.

  • Q: Does Adani Linkbay Residences have a swimming pool, gym, and clubhouse?

    Yes, it offers over 50 lifestyle amenities including a rooftop infinity pool, a state-of-the-art sky gym, and a massive luxury clubhouse.

  • Q: What is the price of 2 BHK / 3 BHK / 4 BHK in Adani Linkbay Residences?

    Prices start at approximately ₹3.30 Cr for 2 BHK, ₹3.99 Cr for 3 BHK, and ₹6.50 Cr for 4 BHK units.

  • Q: What are the security features at Adani Linkbay Residences?

    The project features a multi-tier security system, including 24/7 CCTV surveillance, smart access control, and video door phones.

developer.name: Adani Realty
developer.description: Adani Group is one of India’s biggest business conglomerates worth $10 billion with interests across ports, real estate, oil & gas exploration, special economic zones, edible oil, power generation, coal mining & trading, etc. Adani Realty is its youngest company and the portfolio of Adani projects covers 69 million sq. ft. being currently developed across Ahmedabad, Kochi, Mumbai, Mundra, Gurgaon in residential, commercial and social club categories. It has already won several awards including Affordable Housing Project (Aangan) at CNBC Awaaz Real Estate Awards 2015 for Ahmedabad City. Major offerings include Shantigram Golf Villas, Western Heights, Krupal Heritage across key locations such as Gota, Prahlad Nagar, SG Highway (Ahmedabad), Andheri West, etc. The Group is known for its uncompromising approach towards quality. High standards are maintained at all times in this regard. There is a skilled team of professionals who ensure timely delivery and seamless execution of projects.

_source.specs: 102 Master Bedroom-Walls:Oil Bound Distemper||101 Master Bedroom-Flooring:Vitrified Tiles||201 Other Bedrooms-Flooring:Vitrified Tiles||302 Walls:Oil Bound Distemper||301 Living Area-Flooring:Vitrified Tiles||802 Structure:RCC Frame Structure
_source.seoDescription:
Welcome to Platinum Crest, a premium residential development in DN Nagar, Andheri West, Mumbai. Here, you can enjoy city living while having your own peaceful space.

The building has G+16 floors and only 60 apartments, so it feels private. You can pick from 1BHK, 2BHK, or 3 BHK, with sizes between 415 and 610 sq. ft.

Each apartment has smart designs, modern kitchens, and balconies with nice views. The design makes the homes comfortable and easy to live in every day. A crystalline elevation, cool interiors, and panoramic views make this a residence you’ll love coming home to.

RERA No.: P51800079919

Lifestyle Amenities That Truly Enhance Your Everyday Living

Your lifestyle isn’t average, your home shouldn’t be either. At Platinum Crest, wellness meets wonder.

  • Begin your mornings with deep stretches at the rooftop yoga zone, or break a sweat in the fully equipped fitness studio.
  • By evening, unwind at the sky lounge, where open skies and city lights set the mood.
  • Kids can enjoy themselves safely in their own play area, while you sit back and have coffee with neighbours.
  • If you like sports, you can enjoy cricket on the practice net. Automatic parking and smart home features help make life simple.

It’s thoughtful luxury, without the fuss.

Travel Link and Lifestyle

Step out and the city’s best is at your feet.

  • Platinum Crest is just minutes from Metro Lines 1 & 2A, with DN Nagar Metro Station and Andheri stations within easy reach.
  • Western Express Highway, JVLR, and Link Road provide excellent east–west and north–south movement.
  • You are only 14 minutes from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai Terminal 2
  • You can also visit restaurants like Versova Social and The Little Easy.
  • Near DN Nagar in Andheri West, Mumbai, there is a place called Veera Desai Industrial Estate. Many factories and big storage buildings are there.
  • Just minutes away from popular places like Fun Republic Mall (450 m) and Infiniti Mall.
  • Schools like JBCN International, Vibgyor, and CP Goenka are within a 5 km radius, making school runs and weekend outings a breeze.

Upcoming Infrastructure Andheri West

  • The fully operational Metro Line 2A (DN Nagar–Dahisar) now links western suburbs like never before.
  • Add to that the Metro Lines 7 & 7A, the double-decker Andheri–Powai flyover, JVLR signal-free corridor, and the Metro–Airport link, and you’re looking at significantly reduced commute times; up to 30% faster travel, along with long-term growth benefits.

DN Nagar’s position within this infra web makes it one of Mumbai’s most promising investment pockets.

Investment Opportunities

  • With a 29.2% property appreciation over the past decade and consistent rental demand, Andheri West continues to outperform.

  • Low inventory, increasing remaking, and a central location make DN Nagar ideal for both end-users and investors.

Built by the trusted Platinum Corp, winners of the 2023 Iconic Developer of the Year, you’re choosing a brand known for smart designs and on-time project delivery. With limited availability, Platinum Crest offers long-term value with lifestyle-rich returns.

With Platinum Crest, you don’t just buy a home; you invest in ease, community, and future growth

description.manualDesc:
Platinum Crest is a residential building in Andheri West meant for people who want a quieter home within the city. It is not designed to feel crowded or busy. The idea behind the project is simple living with everyday comfort. It suits people who prefer calm spaces after long workdays.

The project is located in the Upper Juhu and DN Nagar area. This part of Andheri West is well connected and easy to navigate. Metro stations, main roads, shopping areas, and the beach are all close by. Daily travel does not take much effort. Schools, markets, and entertainment spots are also nearby, which helps keep routines smooth.

Platinum Crest is built on about 0.25 acres of land. The building rises up to 16 floors and includes only 60 homes. Because the number of apartments is limited, the building feels private. Neighbours are fewer, and common areas stay quiet. The project includes 1 and 2 bedroom homes, along with jodi options for those who want more space.

Inside the building, things are kept practical and modern. The entrance lobby is large and air-conditioned. Parking is automated, which helps manage space better. Home automation features are included to make daily tasks easier. Apartments are planned to use space well, which matters in a city setting. Rooms feel usable rather than tight.

Platinum Crest is developed by Platinum Corp. The company focuses on building homes that are simple to live in and easy to maintain. Their aim with this project is to create a place that feels comfortable over time, not just at first glance. It is meant for people who want a steady, well-located home in Andheri West.

Amenities at Platinum Crest, Andheri West, Mumbai

Platinum Crest boasts world-class lifestyle amenities and recreational spaces, featuring an entertainment deck, exceptional hospitality services, and a secure and safe environment.

  • Grand entrance lobbies that greet you with style and a cool, calming ambience.
  • A well-equipped fitness centre for energising workouts any time of the day.
  • A cheerful children’s play area where kids can enjoy and explore safely.
  • A cosy business lounge and library for quiet work, reading, and focused moments.
  • A refreshing sky garden that brings greenery and calm high above the city.
  • A peaceful rooftop yoga and meditation zone designed for mindful breathing and quiet mornings.
  • A relaxing sky lounge with open sit-outs for conversations and chill.
  • A fun cricket pitch for friendly matches and active evenings.

Platinum Crest, Andheri West, Mumbai: Perfectly Connected and Smartly Placed

Andheri West provides vibrant city life, seamless connectivity, modern comforts, and a thriving residential lifestyle.

description.manualDesc:
Chandiwala Pearl Universe is a residential project located off Veera Desai Road in Andheri West. It is meant for people who want to live close to the city without feeling boxed in. The building is planned to stay simple and functional. It does not try to feel flashy. Instead, it focuses on comfort, routine, and easy daily living. The project suits working professionals and families who prefer convenience.

The location is one of the stronger points of this project. Major roads, metro stations, and public transport options are nearby. This makes everyday travel manageable. Offices, work hubs, shopping areas, and leisure spots can be reached without long detours. Even though the area around stays busy, the project itself feels more private once inside.

The development is built on around 0.42 acres of land. It has a single 22-storey tower with close to 300 homes. Apartment sizes range from 258 to 648 square feet. The building does not feel overly cramped because of the way floors and common areas are planned. Homes receive daylight and air during most parts of the day. The scale of the project gives a small community feel while staying inside Mumbai.

Inside the apartments, things are kept practical. The structure is built using RCC for long-term strength. Floors are finished with vitrified tiles. Walls have clean finishes without heavy detailing. Fittings are standard and easy to maintain. Electrical and plumbing systems are planned to support daily use without complications. The layouts are simple and easy to move around in.

The project also includes facilities meant for regular use. Residents have access to a gym, swimming pool, jogging and cycling track, children’s play area, and landscaped spaces. Lifts, intercom systems, power backup, and treated water supply are part of the setup. These features support a steady and comfortable routine.

Chandiwala Pearl Universe is developed by Chandiwala Enterprises. The builder focuses on reliable construction and practical planning. The aim here is not excess, but a balanced home that works well over time.

images.name: Master Plan Image 2
images.description:
DLF The Westpark project overview:

This master plan for DLF The Westpark displays 8 distinct numbered residential blocks or clusters. No total land area, total number of units, or specific project launch and completion dates are indicated within this plan.

Land Use & Density

The plan allocates land primarily for residential use, featuring multiple housing clusters distinguishable by color (red, blue, yellow, purple) to perhaps denote different unit types or phases. Integrated green spaces are also visible across the development. Specific land allocation percentages or units per acre are not specified.

Connectivity & Access
  • The property maintains excellent external connectivity to New Link Road (0.1 km), Swami Vivekanand Road (1.0 km), and Western Express Highway (2.5 km).
  • An internal, curving road network provides access to all residential blocks within the development.
  • Visible sections of the internal and external access routes have defined dimensions, including segments of 15.00 M, 23.65 M, 30.00 M, 47.00 M, 55.00 M, and 61.70 M.
  • Primary access points are integrated along the main internal road, linking the various residential clusters.
On-Site Features & Amenities
  • The master plan explicitly features residential buildings, organized into 8 distinct blocks.
  • Designated green areas are visible, integrated throughout the development, suggesting landscaped open spaces.
  • No specific amenities such as a clubhouse, parks, or sports courts are explicitly labeled or detailed within this master plan.
Key Dimensions & Figures
  • The development comprises 8 distinct numbered residential blocks, labeled 1 through 8.
  • The main western boundary of the property measures 138.70 M.
  • The northern periphery of the site extends up to 43.90 M in width.
  • Other notable boundary and access route dimensions within the plan include 15.00 M, 23.65 M, 27.00 M, 30.00 M, 47.00 M, 55.00 M, and 61.70 M.

_source.specs: 102 Master Bedroom-Walls:Acrylic Emulsion||101 Master Bedroom-Flooring:Vitrified Tiles||201 Other Bedrooms-Flooring:Vitrified Tiles||302 Walls:Acrylic Emulsion||301 Living Area-Flooring:Vitrified Tiles||802 Structure:RCC Frame Structure
_source.seoDescription:
DLF The Westpark marks the legendary developer’s grand foray into Mumbai’s luxury real estate landscape. Nestled in the heart of Andheri West, this iconic development brings together timeless elegance, panoramic views, and landmark architecture. This first-ever Mumbai offering by DLF features the exclusive release of Towers 2, currently open for booking. Designed for connoisseurs of refinement, it offers spacious 3 & 4 BHK residences, lavish duplexes, and ultra-limited penthouses, all with no back-facing units, Vastu-compliant layouts, and elite lifestyle integration.

This is more than a home, it’s a new landmark of luxury and distinction in one of Mumbai’s highest potential zones. With only a limited inventory in a low-supply premium market, early-stage buyers stand to benefit from first-mover capital appreciation and steady rental yield potential.

Exemplary Design & Amenities

  • Unit Configurations: 3 & 4 BHK, Duplexes, and Penthouses | Carpet Area: From 1,126 to 2,239 sq. ft.

  • Total Units: 416 | Project Area: 18 Acres (Phase-wise Development)

  • RERA Number: PR1181012500079

  • Natural Imported Marble Flooring in living areas and bathrooms

  • Central VRF Air Conditioning in the living, dining, bedroom, and kitchen areas

  • Private Elevators, Double-Glazed Windows, and Sound Insulation

  • Designer Kitchens & Bathrooms with branded CP fittings and glass partitions

  • Club-Class Living: Grand clubhouse, indoor games, library, guest suites

  • Sky Lounge, Banquet Hall, Business Lounge, and Card Room

Amenities:

  • Sports & Fitness

    • Futsal Court, Basketball Court, Badminton Court
    • Gymnasium, Jogging & Cycling Track, Yoga Zones

  • Leisure & Wellness

    • Swimming Pool

    • Kids’ Pool

    • Aqua Gym

    • Spa

    • Jacuzzi

    • Gazebo


  • Family & Kids

    • Crèche

    • Kids’ Play Areas

    • Sand Pit


  • Tech, Safety & Utilities

    • Video Door Phones, ONT for High-Speed Data & TV

    • Fire Fighting System with Sprinklers & Detectors

    • Rainwater Harvesting, Large Landscaped Green Zones?

DLF signature specification standard attracts ultra-premium clientele. The presence of creche, wellness zones, private lounges, and VRF AC systems not only enhances tenant appeal but ensures long-term asset desirability, especially among expats, CXOs, and global corporates seeking premium rentals in West Mumbai.

Location Advantages


Highway & Connectivity

  • Western Express Highway: Seamless North-South Mumbai travel

  • JVLR & Link Road: Enables direct East-West access

  • Metro Line 1 & 2A: Immediate access to Versova–Ghatkopar & DN Nagar lines

  • Proximity to Airport: 14 mins to CSMIA Terminal 2 via road & metro

Education & Schools (within 1–5 km):

  • Jankidevi Public School, JBCN International, Orchids International, Vibgyor High, CP Goenka

Retail & Lifestyle (within 3 km):

  • Fun Republic Mall (450 m), Citi Mall, Infiniti Mall, Inorbit Mall

  • High-end restaurants and nightlife, including The Barrel & Co, Versova Social, The Little Easy


Corporate & IT Zones:

  • Close to BKC, Powai, MIDC, Marol, and Versova

  • Ideal for working professionals in finance, media, IT, and start-ups?


Rail & Metro:

  • Andheri Station (Western + Harbour Line access)

  • Direct metro link to Ghatkopar, DN Nagar, BKC & International Airport

Andheri West continues to be one of the most sought-after locations in Mumbai due to its connectivity trifecta—rail, road, and metro. With major schools, malls, pubs, and offices within minutes, this is top-tier tenant territory. Investment here offers both liquidity and strong rental upside.

Upcoming Infrastructure Development

  • Metro Line 2A (DN Nagar–Dahisar): Fully operational

  • Metro Line 7 & 7A: Enhancing East-West and Airport connectivity

  • Double-Decker Flyover (Andheri–Powai): Set to ease peak-hour congestion

  • JVLR Widening & Signal-Free Corridor

  • Airport Expansion and Metro-Airport link to increase demand and access

Ongoing infrastructure development is pushing capital values upwards. The double-decker flyover, metro connectivity, and JVLR enhancements are expected to shave 30%+ off peak travel times. Infrastructure-backed micro-markets like this are consistently favoured by long-term investors and NRIs.

Investment Opportunities

  • Capital Appreciation: Andheri West has recorded a 29.2% price surge in the last decade

  • Annual Growth Rate: Averaging 10–15% per year in the last five years

  • Rental Demand: Among the top 3 rental markets in Mumbai for premium and semi-furnished homes

  • Low Inventory & High Demand: A first-mover edge in a low-supply, high-desirability micro-market

  • Redevelopment Push: High redevelopment activity fuels rising land valuations

This is a rare case of Grade-A luxury in a mature suburb with robust absorption rates. Backed by DLF, with elite design and a premium neighbourhood tag, this project offers both short-term resale potential and long-term capital stability, making it ideal for HNIs, NRIs, and portfolio investors.

Builder’s Credibility

DLF Limited, with over 75 years of legacy, is India’s premier real estate developer, known for shaping Gurugram and delivering 100+ landmark projects across India, including Cyber City, Horizon Center, and The Camellias. As India’s first LEED Platinum Developer, DLF is backed by global-grade governance, timely delivery, and strong post-handover support.

Awards:

  • Developer of the Year – Residential (ET Realty Awards)

  • Best Luxury Residential Project (CNBC-Awaaz Awards)

  • Green Champion Award (IGBC)

  • Best Retail Project – DLF Mall of India (Franchise India)

  • Multiple LEED Platinum Certifications for commercial developments

DLF’s entry into Mumbai signifies brand-led value creation. Their delivery history, project scale, and customer-centricity provide a trust anchor for long-term investors looking for capital preservation and appreciation in the same asset.

DLF The Westpark brings DLF’s first-ever luxury residences to Mumbai, offering a rare sanctuary of peace and elegance in the heart of the city’s constant hustle. _source.description:
DLF The Westpark marks the legendary developer’s grand foray into Mumbai’s luxury real estate landscape. Nestled in the heart of Andheri West, this iconic development brings together timeless elegance, panoramic views, and landmark architecture. This first-ever Mumbai offering by DLF features the exclusive release of Towers 2, currently open for booking. Designed for connoisseurs of refinement, it offers spacious 3 & 4 BHK residences, lavish duplexes, and ultra-limited penthouses, all with no back-facing units, Vastu-compliant layouts, and elite lifestyle integration.

This is more than a home, it’s a new landmark of luxury and distinction in one of Mumbai’s highest potential zones. With only a limited inventory in a low-supply premium market, early-stage buyers stand to benefit from first-mover capital appreciation and steady rental yield potential.

Exemplary Design & Amenities

  • Unit Configurations: 3 & 4 BHK, Duplexes, and Penthouses | Carpet Area: From 1,126 to 2,239 sq. ft.

  • Total Units: 416 | Project Area: 18 Acres (Phase-wise Development)

  • RERA Number: PR1181012500079

  • Natural Imported Marble Flooring in living areas and bathrooms

  • Central VRF Air Conditioning in the living, dining, bedroom, and kitchen areas

  • Private Elevators, Double-Glazed Windows, and Sound Insulation

  • Designer Kitchens & Bathrooms with branded CP fittings and glass partitions

  • Club-Class Living: Grand clubhouse, indoor games, library, guest suites

  • Sky Lounge, Banquet Hall, Business Lounge, and Card Room

Amenities:

    • Rainwater Harvesting, Large Landscaped Green Zones?

DLF signature specification standard attracts ultra-premium clientele. The presence of creche, wellness zones, private lounges, and VRF AC systems not only enhances tenant appeal but ensures long-term asset desirability, especially among expats, CXOs, and global corporates seeking premium rentals in West Mumbai.

Location Advantages


Highway & Connectivity

  • Western Express Highway: Seamless North-South Mumbai travel

  • JVLR & Link Road: Enables direct East-West access

  • Metro Line 1 & 2A: Immediate access to Versova–Ghatkopar & DN Nagar lines

  • Proximity to Airport: 14 mins to CSMIA Terminal 2 via road & metro

Education & Schools (within 1–5 km):

  • Jankidevi Public School, JBCN International, Orchids International, Vibgyor High, CP Goenka

Retail & Lifestyle (within 3 km):

  • Fun Republic Mall (450 m), Citi Mall, Infiniti Mall, Inorbit Mall

  • High-end restaurants and nightlife, including The Barrel & Co, Versova Social, The Little Easy


Corporate & IT Zones:

  • Close to BKC, Powai, MIDC, Marol, and Versova

  • Ideal for working professionals in finance, media, IT, and start-ups?


Rail & Metro:

  • Andheri Station (Western + Harbour Line access)

  • Direct metro link to Ghatkopar, DN Nagar, BKC & International Airport

Andheri West continues to be one of the most sought-after locations in Mumbai due to its connectivity trifecta—rail, road, and metro. With major schools, malls, pubs, and offices within minutes, this is top-tier tenant territory. Investment here offers both liquidity and strong rental upside.

Upcoming Infrastructure Development

  • Metro Line 2A (DN Nagar–Dahisar): Fully operational

  • Metro Line 7 & 7A: Enhancing East-West and Airport connectivity

  • Double-Decker Flyover (Andheri–Powai): Set to ease peak-hour congestion

  • JVLR Widening & Signal-Free Corridor

  • Airport Expansion and Metro-Airport link to increase demand and access

Ongoing infrastructure development is pushing capital values upwards. The double-decker flyover, metro connectivity, and JVLR enhancements are expected to shave 30%+ off peak travel times. Infrastructure-backed micro-markets like this are consistently favoured by long-term investors and NRIs.

Investment Opportunities

  • Capital Appreciation: Andheri West has recorded a 29.2% price surge in the last decade

  • Annual Growth Rate: Averaging 10–15% per year in the last five years

  • Rental Demand: Among the top 3 rental markets in Mumbai for premium and semi-furnished homes

  • Low Inventory & High Demand: A first-mover edge in a low-supply, high-desirability micro-market

  • Redevelopment Push: High redevelopment activity fuels rising land valuations

This is a rare case of Grade-A luxury in a mature suburb with robust absorption rates. Backed by DLF, with elite design and a premium neighbourhood tag, this project offers both short-term resale potential and long-term capital stability, making it ideal for HNIs, NRIs, and portfolio investors.

Builder’s Credibility

DLF Limited, with over 75 years of legacy, is India’s premier real estate developer, known for shaping Gurugram and delivering 100+ landmark projects across India, including Cyber City, Horizon Center, and The Camellias. As India’s first LEED Platinum Developer, DLF is backed by global-grade governance, timely delivery, and strong post-handover support.

developer.name: DLF
developer.description:
Square Yards is an authorized partner of DLF for the respective property.The DLF Group is one of the country’s biggest and most well known developers with almost 70 years of experience in the industry and a solid track record. DLF Developers is known for its emphasis on customer satisfaction, innovation and sustainable development. DLF Builders has a significant presence across 24 cities and 15 states in the country and works through a novel business model that accelerates earnings from rentals and development.

The portfolio of DLF properties encompasses multiple residential, retail and commercial projects. The list of planned DLF projects encompasses 284 million sq. ft. while projects covering 41 million sq. ft. are presently being constructed. The Group caters to three residential market segments, namely Luxury, Super Luxury and Premium. Apartments, row houses, condominiums and duplexes are built across these categories by the Group. The Group has also pioneered the whole concept of integrating commercial complexes near residential zones.

DLF Realty also specializes in retail and office rental businesses and develops large scale IT Parks and commercial hubs with leading names like Citibank, GE, Microsoft, IBM, Hewitt, Cognizant, Bank of American and Infosys as clients. Held as one of the pioneers of the shopping and retail wave in the country, the Group has developed several iconic malls and entertainment zones across the country. The Group prides itself on building some of the best residential spaces in the country over close to seven decades with emphasis on design, technology, aesthetics and architectural finesse.

Why DLF?

All DLF residential projects are built with a view towards fusing cutting edge technologies, the best architectural and design layouts, jaw dropping aesthetics, top notch functionality and incredible customer service into one attractive package.

The Group is known for its ethics and supreme professionalism. The Group believes in continual enhancement of quality and customer value and strives to develop world class realty concepts. The Group is also known for its compliance with all necessary legal, environment and community requirements and regulations.

Major Projects:

There are several landmark projects that the Group has developed/is developing across the country. Some of these are:

  • DLF 5: This is a huge community along the Golf Course Road in Gurgaon, offering luxurious condominium enclaves like the DLF Park Place, Magnolias and Aralias among others. The entire community contains some of the best health care, education and community facilities along with leading corporate offices and the South Point Mall. The Horizon Center complex and DLF Golf & Country Club are major attractions here
  • Hyde Park: The Hyde Park Estate is an awe inspiring township at Madhya Marg near PGI Chandigarh and spreads over 229 acres with lush natural greenery and amazing views of the Shivalik Range. This has independent floors, bungalows, plots and commercial areas alike.
  • DLF Gardencity: Located at Gurgaon near the IGI Airport and NH-8, the project lies adjacent to a 1, 000 acre green zone and offers residential, recreational and commercial areas along with luxurious residences and premium amenities and facilities
  • DLF Ultima: The flagship project in the Gardencity project, this comes with premium amenities and luxury homes in addition to nature friendly layouts, amazing balconies with lovely views, water features and a lot more

description.manualDesc:
Purva Estrella is a thoughtfully designed premium residential development located in the upscale neighbourhood of Lokhandwala, Mumbai. It blends expansive open areas with contemporary high-rise living in one of Mumbai’s most sought-after residential destinations.

Spread across approximately 2.95 acres, Purva Estrella Lokhandwala offers around 539 well-planned residences in 2, 3 & 4 BHK configurations. The spacious carpet areas range from 752 sq. ft. to 1700 sq. ft.

One of the defining features of the Project Is Its Unusual Amount of Open Space In An Urban Environment with Over 60% Open Space and 45,000 Square Feet of Actual Landscaped greens.

Each Apartment Has Been Constructed with Functionality and Durability. Each Apartment Features Vitrified Tile, Walls Taped with Oil Bound Distemper, and Reinforced Concrete Frame Construction which gives maximum sturdiness and Minimum Maintenance Requirements.

Purva Estrella includes a Unique 'Biophilic' Entry Experience, By Incorporating Nature Into The Design Of The Building and Encouraging Well-Being From the First Step Within the Complex.

Developed by Puravankara, One of The Oldest and Most Acclaimed Developers In India, Has Proven Itself Over the Last 35 Years. Purva Estrella proves its excellent reputation, combined with consistent and reliable delivery.

The possession date as per RERA number (PM1180002502319)- July 2032


Enjoy a World of Amenities at Purva Estrella, Lokhandwala, Mumbai

Experience 45+ lifestyle amenities crafted for your elevated everyday living.

  • Discover serenity in the 3 Levels of Spanish-Themed Wellness Clubhouse.
  • Float endlessly in the stunning Infinity Pool on the Clubhouse Rooftop.
  • Master your game on the premium Muga & Padel Courts.
  • Smash and rally with friends on the dedicated Pickleball Court.
  • A safe and fun retreat for your little ones at the Kids' Play Area.
  • Sculpt your best self in the fully equipped Gym.
  • Find your zen in the peaceful Yoga Areas.
  • Celebrate life's moments on the lush Party Lawn.
  • Stay fit and refreshed on the scenic Jogging/Cycle Track.
  • Connect effortlessly with the reliable Intercom Facility.
  • Enjoy performances at the community Amphitheatre.

It’s not just amenities; it’s a way of life thoughtfully designed around every generation.

developer.name: Puravankara
developer.description:
Puravankara Developers was founded in the year 1975 and is synonymous with quality, reliability and transparency above all else. Puravankara Realty has always believed in customer centricity, quality engineering and unmatched quality as cornerstones for success. The company develops projects in both residential and commercial segments.

The portfolio of Puravankara properties encompasses 48 residential projects and 2 commercial projects collectively covering 23.54 million sq. ft. The current portfolio of ongoing Puravankara projects covers 24.87 million sq. ft. and another 22.73 million sq. ft. of projects have been lined up as projected developments. The company is ISO certified and has also obtained the CRISIL DA2+ rating. The Puravankara Group has a significant presence in cities like Bangalore, Kochi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Coimbatore, Mysore and also in Mumbai. The Group has also forayed into global markets like Colombo, Dubai and Saudi Arabia.

Why Puravankara?

All Puravankara residential projects are synonymous with superior quality and elevated living standards. The company emphasizes hugely on customer satisfaction, reliability and overall fulfillment. The company is known for delivering projects in a timely manner and has its own quality management system which encompasses several processes and methodologies for ensuring unmatched project quality.

This system ensures delivery of large scale project at optimum costs and also ensures minimal impact on the environment. ISO 9001 guidelines are adhered to in case of project development. The company also has its own project review management system which enables quick resolution of all project issues and facilitates speedier execution. The company believes in transparency when it comes to all business dealings.

Major Projects

  • Coronation Square- This ultra luxury residential project is located at Bangalore’s JP Nagar and is well connected to several parts of Bangalore through important arterial roads and expressways along with reputed educational institutions, shopping malls and hospitals. The project offers amenities like a swimming pool, outdoor Jacuzzi, well equipped gymnasium and more
  • Purva Venezia- Purva Venezia is a tribute to the beautiful Venetian landscape through its arched bridges, waterways and manicured gardens. Premium amenities include a gymnasium, supermarket, Jacuzzi, swimming pool, health spa and a whole lot more. The project covers 1600 acres of natural greenery and is located at Yelahanka in Bangalore
  • Purva Windermere- Located at Pallikaranai in Chennai, this project spreads over 55 acres and offers abundant natural greenery to residents. The project offers elevated and luxurious lifestyles to residents complete with two world class club houses and access to multiplexes, shopping malls and schools

_source.seoDescription:
Godrej Skyshores is an ultra-premium residential project by Godrej Properties, strategically located in the heart of Versova, Mumbai. Spread across approximately 1.98 acres, the project features two elegant towers with around 148 exclusive residences. It offers spacious 3 and 4 BHK apartments, each designed with expansive balconies, large windows, and high-end finishes. Many homes provide panoramic views of the Arabian Sea and Mumbai’s city skyline.

Exemplary Design & Amenities

  • Unit Config: 3 & 4 BHK Flats | Size: 1500 Sq. Ft. to 2500 Sq. Ft. (Carpet)
  • Number of Units: 148 | Total Area: ~1.98 Acres
  • RERA Number: PM1180002500076
  • Sea-facing residences start from the 7th floor upwards
  • Spacious decks or balconies for outdoor living
  • Vastu-compliant layouts
  • Premium branded fittings and finishes
  • Eco-friendly construction elements

  • Sports & Fitness

    • Infinity-edge swimming pool
    • Fully equipped gymnasium
    • Jogging track
    • Yoga pavilion
    • Multipurpose sports court

  • Recreation & Leisure

    • Grand clubhouse for events and social gatherings
    • Landscaped gardens and open spaces
    • Banquet hall and luxurious lobby
    • Indoor games room
    • Common garden areas

  • Children & Family

    • Dedicated children play area
    • Kids activity zone
    • Family decks for bonding and relaxation

  • Wellness

    • Spa and sauna
    • Meditation zones
    • Relaxation areas

  • Convenience & Security

    • 24x7 CCTV surveillance
    • Ample parking for residents and visitors
    • Wi-Fi-enabled common zones
    • Vastu-compliant planning

  • Eco-friendly Features

    • Rainwater harvesting
    • Solar power for common areas
    • Energy-efficient lighting
    • Smart water management

Godrej Skyshores offers a rare blend of seafront luxury and green-living consciousness. From infinity pools to open-air decks and wellness zones, every amenity is crafted to serve both leisure and lifestyle. The low-density design and elevated specifications ensure high asset value in the luxury segment.

Location Advantages

  • Highway & Road Connectivity

    • Versova Metro Station (Line 1) – ~850 m | ~5 mins
    • Western Express Highway – 6.2 km | ~15–20 mins
    • Link Road – 2.1 km | ~7 mins
    • Bandra-Versova Sea Link (under construction) – will connect directly to Bandra & South Mumbai

  • Nearby Business & IT Hubs

    • SEEPZ, Andheri East – 8.5 km | ~25 mins
    • MIDC, Andheri – 7.2 km | ~20 mins
    • NESCO IT Park, Goregaon – 10.3 km | ~30 mins
    • Mindspace Malad – 12.5 km | ~35 mins
    • Technopolis Knowledge Park – 9.1 km | ~25 mins

  • SEZs

    • SEEPZ SEZ – 8.5 km | ~25 mins

  • Airport Connectivity

    • Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport – 9.6 km | ~25–30 mins

Versova’s unmatched combination of beachside serenity and metro connectivity makes it an elite yet accessible location. With direct links to commercial zones and lifestyle hotspots, the micro-market offers long-term appeal for both investors and end-users alike.

Upcoming Infrastructure Development

  • Bandra-Versova Sea Link (BVSL)

    • Under construction; will reduce travel time to Bandra and South Mumbai significantly

  • Metro Lines 2A & 7

    • Expansion to boost east-west and north-south connectivity

  • Ongoing Urban Development

    • Road widening and beautification in Versova & Andheri West
    • Proposed commercial hubs and tech parks in the extended Andheri-Versova belt

With the BVSL and metro network reshaping commute efficiency, Versova is transitioning from a lifestyle enclave to a high-performance real estate destination. These upgrades will uplift capital appreciation and ease of living.

Investment Opportunities

  • Real Estate Growth

    • Versova luxury property segment is in limited supply but high demand
    • Consistent price appreciation over the last 5–7 years

  • Rental Yield

    • Premium sea-facing homes in Versova command strong rental yields (3–5%)

  • ROI & Demand

    • High-end demand driven by Bollywood, expats, and HNIs
    • Rapid urban improvements expected to boost ROI substantially

Versova offers a rare mix of exclusivity, high-end lifestyle, and future-ready infrastructure. With upcoming infrastructure, sea-view units, and limited inventory, Godrej Skyshores is primed for long-term value creation and rental profitability.

Builder Credibility

Godrej Properties, part of the 125-year-old Godrej Group, is one of India’s most reputed real estate developers. Known for quality, sustainability, and innovation, the firm has delivered landmark projects across India and has received multiple national and international awards.

  • India’s Most Trusted Real Estate Brand (Brand Trust Report)
  • IGBC Platinum-rated green buildings across projects
  • Developer of the Year – Residential (ET Now)
  • Most Respected Real Estate Brand (Business World Real Estate Awards)

Godrej Skyshores redefines Versova’s luxury skyline with its elevated seafront living, premium amenities, and landmark design. Backed by Godrej Properties’ stellar track record and strategic location advantages, it stands as a prime opportunity for high-end investors and lifestyle-focused homebuyers alike.

developer.name: Godrej
developer.description:
Godrej Properties is a name to reckon with in the realty and construction industry in India. The company is a part of the Godrej Group, one of India’s biggest and most trusted business conglomerates with interests in real estate, consumer goods, agribusinesses, appliances, locks and security solutions and many other verticals. Godrej Developers harnesses this 119 year old legacy of trust and excellence and emphasizes on top class technology and design for its projects.

Godrej Realty is known for its focus on sustainability and innovation. The list of Godrej projects includes multiple residential, township and commercial projects. The company is currently developing 115 million sq. ft. of projects in 12 Indian cities. The company has received in excess of 150 recognitions and awards and aims at being one of the top three developers in the nation. The company recently partnered with APG for setting up a $275 million fund to expand its real estate interests while the parent Group has also earmarked INR 1, 900 crore as a realty fund.

Why Godrej?

All Godrej residential projects come with immense brand value and are symbolic of trust, reliability and integrity. The company successfully leverages resources of its parent Group and has properly structured systems for T&D, HR, Planning, Marketing and Finance. The company believes in transparency and adherence to all industry regulations. The company has top notch processes and works with the latest technologies including Concerto and SAP in addition to possessing a skilled professional team for working on projects.

The company adheres to the highest quality standards in terms of project execution, services and materials. Customer requirements are neatly integrated into designs and layouts while the company also prides itself on its project management capabilities. The company makes use of CCPM and other innovations for delivering projects faster and works with leading architects and other industry experts for its projects.

Major Projects:

  • Godrej Sky Garden- Located near the Panvel railway station and NH-4 in Mumbai, this project offers a double height garden and landscaped garden in addition to premium apartments and amenities like a mini shopping complex, swimming pool and more
  • Godrej Sky- Located at Byculla, one of Mumbai’s best connected and most strategically situated areas, the project offers luxurious apartments furnished by the best and globally renowned brands in addition to gorgeous panoramic views, state of the art facilities and premium amenities. An IGBC certified green project, Sky comes with several environment friendly measures
  • Godrej Azure- Located at OMR, Chennai, Azure offers spacious and luxurious interiors in addition to delightful sea views and premium amenities and facilities. With social spaces and beautiful gardens dotting the project, there’s a lot in store for residents
  • Godrej Infinity- This premium project offers 270 degree open views in homes along with large balconies. With 70% open spaces, lush natural greenery, club concierge services, home automation facilities, spa services and sports academy, this project takes the cake when it comes to recreation and indulgence alike. This is located at Keshavnagar in Pune

blogCMSContent.post_content:
Andheri West is one of Mumbai’s primary residential areas and is mainly residential as compared to its eastern neighbour. Demand for property in Andheri West has increased immensely over the years, and there are several luxury and super luxury projects in the area that are led by prominent builders like Godrej, Kabra, Adani Group, K Raheja, and Oberoi, among others. There are several new and under construction projects available in the area, while 2 and 3 BHK living units are predominant. Andheri Railway Station is the main connectivity lifeline for residents, and the expansion of the metrorail network as part of the Andheri-Ghatkopar-Versova corridor has boosted inter-connectivity immensely. The Mumbai metro network will connect the area to the eastern suburbs. The area lies in close proximity to Jogeshwari, Malad Creek, Goregaon, and the BMC Road. SEEPZ, MIDC, and the Chhatrapati Shivaji International Airport Terminal are also located within close range of the locality. Even though it is mainly residential, Andheri West is home to some of Mumbai and India’s biggest entertainment and media houses, like Balaji Telefilms, Yash Raj Films, etc. Andheri West is a large and developed residential and commercial suburb. The locality includes several prominent areas, including the Lokhandwala Complex, Versova, Seven Bungalows, and Four Bungalows.

What’s Great / What’s Not Great about Locality

  • The area has a well-connected road network along with an extensive connection of railways and very good connectivity to all parts of the city.
  • The problem of heavy traffic and water logging in the monsoon months is one of the problems residents face here.
  • The locality is a peaceful locality and it has a nearby Azad Nagar Metro Station off J P road. It is well connected to the east-west flyover.

Physical Infrastructure and Livability Index

The locality has widespread and extensive connectivity through Link Road, SV Road, the Western Express Highway, Andheri Railway Station, and the BEST Bus Network. It also has east-west metro connectivity through the operational Line 1 connecting Versova, Andheri, and Ghatkopar. Additionally, the under-construction Line 2 (Dahisar - Mandale), would further boost metro connectivity to the areas to its north and east. Due to its proximity to well connected roads and the availability of all kinds of basic amenities, the area has a high livability index. Availability of excellent connectivity, quality social infrastructure, and presence of various commercial units makes Andheri West a sought-after real estate location. Andheri West has a number of multi-storey apartment projects along with several co-operative housing societies. Some of the main residential projects by reputed developers in the locality include Oberoi Springs, HDIL Metropolis, Adani Western Heights, etc. The locality is situated alongside Andheri East, a marked  commercial hub of Mumbai, and encompasses several industrial and commercial complexes. Many important job hubs are within a close proximity of 5-8 km from the locality, including NESCO IT Park, Nirlon Knowledge Park, Mindspace Malad, and Lotus Corporate Park. Also, the prominent employment centre of Bandra Kurla Complex is well-connected to the locality and is about 10-15 km from Andheri West

Social Infrastructure

There are several malls near the vicinity of Andheri West, namely the City Mall and Infinity Mall. The Versova Beach and Club is a prominent recreational centre along with Nana Nani Park. Reputable educational institutions like the Ryan Global School, Bhavan’s Institute of Interdisciplinary Studies, Gandhi College of Technology, and St. Louis Convent School are also located in close proximity to the area. Leading hospitals like Seven Hills Hospital, Sanghvi Hospital, Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital,  Medical Research Institute, and Holy Spirit Hospital are also very nearby to the area. Property prices have gone up by approximately 0.31% in the area as per Q3 2015, and average prices stand at approximately INR 21, 093 per sq. ft. here for the same period. Popular projects like The Wadhwa, Runwal Elegante, The Nest, Adani Group Western Heights, Bharat Parkvistas, Acme Stadium View, and RNA Corp. Springs, Oberoi Realty Sky Heights, etc. The locality enjoys the availability of many schools, colleges, hospitals, market complexes, malls, and eateries.

Nearby Locality

Enjoys close connectivity with significant office and industrial hubs within a close reach of 5-8 km. Also, it has enough availability of schools, colleges, hospitals, clinics, malls, markets, and restaurants to turn it into a self-sustaining neighbourhood. Many transport services are available in the locality. 

  • Compared to its counterparts the locality is well accounted for by the residents
  • Rail service bus service and other transportation options can be considered while visiting

cmsNews.summary: The Maharashtra Housing Policy 2025,  aims to provide high-quality housing for all income levels, with key highlights including a simplified regulatory framework, boosted rental housing supply, and enhanced slum rehabilitation efforts. The policy will mobilize investments worth ₹70,000 crore and construct 35 lakh houses by 2030.

The BMC is revamping its dry waste centers to modernize waste management across the city. In the first phase, 10 of the existing 41 centers will be upgraded, including sites at Wadala, Marol-Andheri, Dahisar East, and Borivali West, with plans to introduce conveyor belts and advanced segregation units to reduce the burden on dumping grounds.

A joint study by UDRI and NAGAR found that only 30% of public open spaces in Mumbai's K-West (Andheri West) and P-North (Malad) wards are fully accessible for recreation. The study analyzed open spaces against the Development Plan (DP) 2034, revealing that little of the designated open land has been translated into usable parks, gardens, or playgrounds.

The Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) is leasing out 68,166 square feet of retail and commercial space across stations on Metro Lines 2A and 7 to generate non-fare revenue for the financial viability of Mumbai's metro services.

The Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) is developing a master plan to increase revenue for Metro Line 1 (Andheri-Ghatkopar) [. The plan focuses on generating income through advertisements at metro premises and leasing space at stations, rather than increasing ticket prices.

Central Pollution Control Board data indicates that toxic ozone is dominating Mumbai's air quality as winter smog intensifies. High levels of ozone, NO2, and PM2.5 have been observed, particularly in western and eastern suburbs like Andheri, Bandra, and Chembur. This pollution is linked to accelerated mortality rates, cardiovascular issues, and respiratory problems.
cmsNews.heading: Mumbai's Air Quality Plummets as Toxic Ozone Levels Rise

cmsNews.source: NBM&CW / APN News, Realty plus magazine
cmsNews.summary: Sanghvi Realty has launched two new residential projects, Sanghvi Tirth in Andheri and Sanghvi Morya in Shivaji Park, with a combined Gross Development Value (GDV) of ₹220 crore. These projects are awaiting Commencement Certificates and are expected to boost housing supply in established Mumbai neighborhoods, offering improved connectivity and social infrastructure.
cmsNews.heading: Sanghvi Realty Launches New Residential Projects in Mumbai

cmsNews.summary: The Indian real estate market, particularly in Mumbai, experienced a surge in redevelopment and township projects in 2025. Mumbai alone is projected to see over 44,000 new apartments worth ₹1.3 lakh crore, indicating a growing preference for quality living environments and integrated infrastructure, with premium and luxury housing sales dominating the market.
cmsNews.heading: Mumbai Real Estate Market Shows Strong Performance in 2025

cmsNews.summary: The Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) plans to open Mumbai Metro Line 6 in the second half of 2026, proceeding without the Kanjurmarg car depot.This 15.31 km Pink Line will connect Swami Samarth Nagar in Andheri (West) with Vikhroli, providing crucial east-west connectivity. Metro Car overhauling will be done at the Mandale depot.
cmsNews.heading: Mumbai Metro Line 6 Set to Open in Second Half of 2026 with Innovative Maintenance Solution

cmsNews.summary: Keystone Realtors Ltd. has been selected to redevelop eight housing societies in Andheri (East), Mumbai. The project will rehouse 637 existing members and is expected to unlock approximately 5 lakh sq ft of free sale area, with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of Rs 1,775 crore. This project highlights the increasing trend of large-scale society redevelopment in Mumbai.
cmsNews.heading: Keystone Realtors to Redevelop 8 Societies in Andheri, Aiming for Rs 1775 Crore Revenue
