developer.name: Lodha
developer.description:
The Lodha Group is one of the country’s foremost developers and is amongst the elite league of multinational real estate entities with a significant presence both in India and the United Kingdom. Lodha Developers is one of the most profitable companies in the Indian real estate sector and has built several landmark projects over the years.

Lodha Builders is currently developing a whopping 43 million sq. ft. of prime realty space with the biggest land reserves in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. It has 28 ongoing projects spread across Hyderabad, Pune, Mumbai and London and is also expanding its presence in Bangalore. The Group has the biggest land bank spreading over more than 6, 200 acres with approximate saleable area of 553 million sq. ft.

Some of the landmark Lodha projects pertain to its Building a Better Life motto including the iconic World One, the tallest residential tower in the world and the Palava City which is the country’s first Greenfield smart city. The Group has brought some of the biggest global names/brands like Trump, Armani/Casa, Jade Jagger, Philippe Starck, Greg Norman, Kelly Hoppen and Pei Cobb Freed to India. The Group is also famous for recording the largest land deal in the country till date when it purchased a plot from the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority in the year 2010 for a staggering INR 4, 053 crore. The Group has also acquired other land parcels in Thane, the famous Washington House property on Altamount Road from the American Government and also the Mumbai Textile Mills land parcel.

The Group acquired the iconic MacDonald House at Grosvenor Square in the year 2013. The Group has also acquired other sites in London and is targeting the delivery of 1, 000 homes every year from 2017 onwards. The Group has offices in Dubai, London and Shanghai and is set to open offices in Singapore and the United States of America as well. The Group has more than 25, 000 workmen at its project sites along with more than 1800 engineers, 800 management professionals and 150 architects and designers. CASA by Lodha is the consumer luxury arm of the Group which offers residences for the middle income segment. The Group also introduced branded office spaces with offerings at almost every level including corporate hubs, large scale campuses and even boutique office for emerging businesses.

Why Lodha?

All Lodha properties come with clean titles and deeds and top class designs. All Lodha residential projects have clearly differentiated branding and marketing and the Group offers top notch customer and after sales service as well. The Group develops environmentally friendly projects that come with sky gardens, landscaping and other measures. The Group also offers housekeeping, valet and other services to customers going by its hospitality-like approach towards development.

The Group assigns relationship managers to each customer and has efficient and advanced systems and processes both for development and also for customer management and service. The Group also believes in honesty, integrity and transparency as key principles for a successful journey ahead.

Major Projects:

  • Palava City- luxurious air conditioned homes in India’s first greenfield smart city with jaw dropping amenities along the Kalyan-Shil Road
  • Trump Tower- A collaborative landmark between Trump and Lodha, this offers ultra premium branded 3 and 4 BHK apartments at the prime location of Worli
  • New Cuffe Parade- Another landmark project spreading over 23 acres with the largest clubhouses in the country and easy access to the BKC and South Bombay
  • Lodha Altamount- Ultra luxury at its best, these branded residences offer panoramic Arabian sea views, all glass facades, customization options and five star living on a 24-7 basis
  • Lodha Bellezza- South India’s tallest towers encompassing super luxurious 3 and 4 BHK sky villas along with other premium amenities near HITEC City

developer.name: Kalpataru
developer.description:
The Kalpataru Group is one of Mumbai’s leading developers and has been a key player in the industry for over four decades. Kalpataru Developers is known for pioneering innovations, superior project execution and awe inspiring designs. Kalpataru Builders has definitely played its part in transforming the Mumbai skyline with several landmark projects till date. Founded in 1969 by Mofatraj P. Munot, the Group has won several laurels and awards for its projects.

The portfolio of Kalpataru properties encompasses high end commercial, residential and retail projects in addition to lifestyle gated communities, integrated townships and redevelopment projects spreading across the Mumbai Metropolitan Region and Pune. The Group also has a significant presence in other markets like Surat, Hyderabad, Jaipur and Chennai. Apart from real estate, the Group also has interests in project management, engineering, procurement and construction (EPC), infrastructure projects, logistics, warehousing, roads, power transmission projects and property management solutions.

The Group was one of the biggest civil contracting firms working in the Middle East between 1974-1982 and is behind some of the biggest projects in the Gulf. There are more than 80 Kalpataru projects till date which have become landmarks in their own rights.

Why Kalpataru?

All Kalpataru residential projects are built with an eye on quality, innovation and customer centricity. The Group believes in values like humility, respect, prudence, business ethics, integrity, reliability, trust, transparency, customer commitment and long term relationships with customers and all stakeholders. Along with adhering to stringent quality standards, the Group also follows an Integrated Design Approach (IDeA).

This approach takes into account environmental impact, quality of life, cost, productivity, creativity, lifestyle benefits and future flexibility while creating project designs. The Group believes in sustainable, cost effective, productive, safe, functional and accessible development.

Major Projects:

  • Kalpataru Square- Located at Andheri, this the first project in Asia and the sixth project in the world to receive the US Green Building Council’s Platinum Level Certification LEED- Core & Shell
  • Kalpataru Horizon- Located at the prime South Mumbai location of Worli, this project has the first residential floor starting from the 14th floor to ensure that every apartment has gorgeous sea views
  • Kalpataru Habitat- Located at Parel, this is the first project in Mumbai to get an independent car park building along with other sporting facilities such as a golf putting green, tennis court and basketball court on top of the residential building
  • Swapnalok- This landmark project is located along the tony Napean Sea Road and offers stepped row houses with private terraces and luxurious interiors, another first in Mumbai’s realty market
  • E3 Home- Another first, the E3 Homes include 2 regular sized bedrooms along with a smaller room that can be used as a study, storage or Pooja room depending on customer requirements

topProjects.seoDescription:
Hiranandani Vista Residences is a luxurious residential project located in the prestigious Sublocation of Andheri West. developer.name: Hiranandani
developer.description:
The Hiranandani Group was founded in the year 1978 and is known for its customer centric outlook. Hiranandani Developers has always been known for its landmark offerings across Mumbai and has forayed into other segments like hospitality, healthcare, education, entertainment and leisure segments as well. Hiranandani Builders is primarily synonymous with customer commitment, quality, architectural excellence and overall reliability.

The company has always spotted new trends and adapted to the same over the years. The company has a pan Indian and global presence today with big ticket and iconic projects across Thane, Powai and other areas. The company has a team of more than 1, 600 people and is spearheaded by its Co-Founder and MD, Niranjan Hiranandani. The portfolio of Hiranandani properties includes several residential and mixed use township projects in addition to commercial, hospitality, institutional and other projects.

The company has truly gone global with its 23 Marina project which is a 90 storied tower in the Dubai Marina region with a height of 395 metres. The company has recently forayed into Chennai and Panvel along with retaining its presence in Mumbai and its suburbs. The company also has plans for big ticket projects in Alibaug, Pune and Ahmedabad in the near future.

Why Hiranandani?

Hiranandani Realty has always been synonymous with cutting edge technologies and has always pioneered new construction and project technologies in the industry. Timely project delivery is another major strength of the company along with customer centricity and reliability. The company has always aimed at offering better lifestyles to customers that adhere to global standards.

All Hiranandani residential projects are aimed at offering greater value to customers and all other stakeholders. The company offers premium amenities and other lifestyle features at its projects and also believes in environment friendly and sustainable development. The company is known for its customer commitment and walks the extra mile to bring smiles on the faces of its clients.

Landmark Projects:

There are several iconic and landmark projects that have been developed by the company over the years. There are several premium Hiranandani upcoming projects in the offing as well. Here’s taking a look at some of the landmark offerings of the company till date-

  • Hiranandani Gardens- This is a landmark project located at Powai opposite the Powai Lake and spreads over a whopping 250 acres in all. The project is home to more than 4, 00 families and is one of Mumbai’s first big ticket residential townships. The project has been planned intelligently and comes with several amenities and facilities
  • The Walk- Located at Thane, this premium project offers a high street living concept with 1 BHK apartments and retail cum lifestyle layouts. The buildings are named Fortuna, Castalia and Ventana
  • Hiranandani Meadows- Another famous and iconic project, Hiranandani Meadows is located at Thane and is regarded as the most premium township in the entire region. This project spreads over 40 acres and comes with premium amenities and facilities
  • Hiranandani Heritage- Located at Kandivali West, the project offers 1-5 BHK apartments with nature friendly layouts, charming designs, strategic connectivity and top class amenities

developer.name: Rustomjee
developer.description:
Rustomjee Developers is a leading real estate company and has developed several landmark projects over the years. Rustomjee Builders is synonymous with high quality materials, pioneering designs and architectural grandeur. The company has contributed towards transforming the skyline of Mumbai and its suburbs with its projects.

The portfolio of Rustomjee properties encompasses a whopping 10 million sq. ft. across corporate parks, luxury townships, retail spaces and more than 8, 500 housing units. The tally of Rustomjee projects built over the last five years cover 8 million sq. ft. and these are majorly concentrated in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Rustomjee Realty is focused on adding another 13 million sq. ft. to its kitty over the next five years.

Why Rustomjee?

All Rustomjee residential projects come with amenities like swimming pools and playgrounds along with other premium amenities. The company is child centric in terms of its planning and also builds eco friendly structures. The company follows an age old design philosophy where form follows function.

This aspect comes through in every design and layout. The company adheres to stringent quality standards for its projects as part of its Better, not cheaper philosophy. The company believes in customer centricity as a key attribute towards success and has innumerable happy customers under its belt. The company does not substitute price at the cost of quality. The company believes in a philosophy of teamwork with its customers. 100% customer satisfaction is a major objective at the company along with long term customer relationships.

The company is firmly committed towards delivering projects on time to customers along with innovation, design excellence, transparent processes and contemporary works systems in addition to superior quality and total accountability and transparency in all business dealings. The company offers amenities that cater to senior citizens, children and adults alike and all its projects also come with cutting edge security and safety measures. The company believes in living spaces as natural extensions of their environments. The company integrates futuristic technologies into its projects and fuses the same with classic and traditional design sensibilities while keeping 21st century lifestyle needs at the forefront at all times.

Major Projects

There are several landmark projects developed by the company over the years and the list also includes several Rustomjee upcoming projects. Here’s taking a look at some of them:

  • Rustomjee Paramount- This landmark project spreads over 1.65 acres at Khar West and offers a signature high rise that offers gorgeous views of the city and Arabian sea alike. The project offers unmatched luxury and wonderfully designed 1, 2, 3 and 4 BHK apartments. The project has been designed by renowned architects Sanjay Puri and Patty Mak and offers premium amenities and lavish lifestyles to residents
  • Rustomjee Season- This premium residential project is located at the BKC Annexe and come with bespoke residences designed by leading architect Sanjay Puri. The project spreads over 4 acres and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents along with luxuriously designed 3, 3.5 and 4 BHK apartments. Ambience is the major winner at this project
  • Rustomjee Meridian- This project is located at Kandivali and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents. The project encompasses a stunning 20 storied building which lies just three and a half kilometres away from the Kandivali station and offers great connectivity to the Link Road and SV Road. The Metro line is also easily accessible from the project

images.name: Master Plan Image 7
images.description:
Rustomjee Elita features four distinct residential blocks, labeled as Wing-A, Wing-B, Wing-C, and Wing-D. The master plan provides an overview of the property's layout and amenities within the given land parcel. Specific total land area, number of units, or project dates are not detailed on this plan.

Land Use & Density

The development primarily allocates space to residential structures across four wings, centrally organized around a significant open space. This central area is designated for recreational activities and landscaping, with additional green zones along the property's perimeter. The design integrates these residential and amenity zones within the site.

Connectivity & Access
  • The property in Andheri West has direct access from a 12.30-meter-wide W.D.P. Road.
  • Internal road networks allow vehicular movement throughout the complex, connecting to individual wings and parking areas.
  • The plan shows designated 'RAMP ON' entry points and an 'EXIT' point for vehicle flow.
  • Additional external connectivity includes Vaikunthlal Mheta Road (2.1 km), Guru Nanak Road (2.0 km), and the Western Express Highway (4.1 km).
On-Site Features & Amenities
  • A central landscaped area, marked with green spaces and play structures, serves as a key amenity for residents.
  • Integrated ramps provide vehicular access, likely to parking levels, as indicated by 'RAMP ON' and 'HAMIT CON' labels.
  • Green landscaping with trees is visible along the external road and within the complex.
Key Dimensions & Figures
  • The external W.D.P. Road bordering the property is explicitly shown as 12.30 meters wide.
  • The development includes four separate residential structures: Wing-A, Wing-B, Wing-C, and Wing-D.
  • Visible units within Wing-D are numbered 1, 2, 3, and 4.
  • Visible units within Wing-C are numbered 1, 2, and 3.
  • Visible units within Wing-B are numbered 1, 2, and 3.
  • Visible units within Wing-A are numbered 1.

developer.name: Rustomjee
developer.description:
Rustomjee Developers is a leading real estate company and has developed several landmark projects over the years. Rustomjee Builders is synonymous with high quality materials, pioneering designs and architectural grandeur. The company has contributed towards transforming the skyline of Mumbai and its suburbs with its projects.

The portfolio of Rustomjee properties encompasses a whopping 10 million sq. ft. across corporate parks, luxury townships, retail spaces and more than 8, 500 housing units. The tally of Rustomjee projects built over the last five years cover 8 million sq. ft. and these are majorly concentrated in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Rustomjee Realty is focused on adding another 13 million sq. ft. to its kitty over the next five years.

Why Rustomjee?

All Rustomjee residential projects come with amenities like swimming pools and playgrounds along with other premium amenities. The company is child centric in terms of its planning and also builds eco friendly structures. The company follows an age old design philosophy where form follows function.

This aspect comes through in every design and layout. The company adheres to stringent quality standards for its projects as part of its Better, not cheaper philosophy. The company believes in customer centricity as a key attribute towards success and has innumerable happy customers under its belt. The company does not substitute price at the cost of quality. The company believes in a philosophy of teamwork with its customers. 100% customer satisfaction is a major objective at the company along with long term customer relationships.

The company is firmly committed towards delivering projects on time to customers along with innovation, design excellence, transparent processes and contemporary works systems in addition to superior quality and total accountability and transparency in all business dealings. The company offers amenities that cater to senior citizens, children and adults alike and all its projects also come with cutting edge security and safety measures. The company believes in living spaces as natural extensions of their environments. The company integrates futuristic technologies into its projects and fuses the same with classic and traditional design sensibilities while keeping 21st century lifestyle needs at the forefront at all times.

Major Projects

There are several landmark projects developed by the company over the years and the list also includes several Rustomjee upcoming projects. Here’s taking a look at some of them:

  • Rustomjee Paramount- This landmark project spreads over 1.65 acres at Khar West and offers a signature high rise that offers gorgeous views of the city and Arabian sea alike. The project offers unmatched luxury and wonderfully designed 1, 2, 3 and 4 BHK apartments. The project has been designed by renowned architects Sanjay Puri and Patty Mak and offers premium amenities and lavish lifestyles to residents
  • Rustomjee Season- This premium residential project is located at the BKC Annexe and come with bespoke residences designed by leading architect Sanjay Puri. The project spreads over 4 acres and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents along with luxuriously designed 3, 3.5 and 4 BHK apartments. Ambience is the major winner at this project
  • Rustomjee Meridian- This project is located at Kandivali and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents. The project encompasses a stunning 20 storied building which lies just three and a half kilometres away from the Kandivali station and offers great connectivity to the Link Road and SV Road. The Metro line is also easily accessible from the project

images.name: Master Plan Image 4
images.description:
The project, Rustomjee Elements Wing SG, is located in Andheri West. It features multiple residential wings: Aer (Wing G), Aqua (Wing F), Espace (Wing E), Lumiere (Wing D), Ignis (Wing C), Rendezvous (Wing B), and Terra (Wing A).

Land Use & Density

The master plan showcases a residential development built around a large, central landscaped green space. Residential buildings are positioned to maximize access to these open recreational areas, which include designated children's play zones.

Connectivity & Access
  • The property is fronted by a 30.50 M. Wide Road on one side and a 9.15 M. Wide Road on another.
  • Main entry and exit points for vehicles are located on the 9.15 M. Wide Road.
  • Internal pathways provide pedestrian access throughout the residential wings and central amenities.
  • The project is approximately 0.2 km from Link Road.
On-Site Features & Amenities
  • A large, landscaped central garden with designated children's play areas.
  • A temple is situated within the premises.
  • Areas for open recreation, possibly including a multi-purpose court, are integrated into the central green space.
Key Dimensions & Figures
  • The primary perimeter roads are 30.50 meters and 9.15 meters in width.
  • The development consists of seven residential wings: Wings A, B, C, D, E, F, and G.
  • The overall site plan is characterized by a triangular shape.

topProjects.seoDescription:
Introducing Runwal Elegante, a prestigious residential project located in the heart of Andheri West, connected to major roads such as New Link Road, Versova Road, and Western Express Highway. This RERA registered project (P51800003620) offers a unique blend of luxury, comfort, and convenience, making it the perfect address for individuals seeking a high-quality lifestyle.

The project boasts a range of amenities, including a gymnasium and power backup, ensuring that residents can enjoy a hassle-free living experience. The specifications of the project are equally impressive, with features such as oil-bound distemper walls in the master bedroom.

Bringing luxury to new heights, Runwal Elegante offers a range of thoughtfully designed units, including 2, 3, 4, and 5 BHK apartments, spanning from 975 to 2753 square feet. Each unit is crafted with precision, providing ample space for comfort and relaxation. With prices ranging from 5.04 Cr to 14.22 Cr, there s something for every budget. Whether you re a young professional, a growing family, or an individual seeking a peaceful retreat, Runwal Elegante has it all.

Available Unit Options

Nearby Landmarks

The residential property is strategically located near several notable landmarks, providing residents with easy access to essential amenities and services. These landmarks not only enhance the quality of life for residents but also offer a unique blend of convenience and comfort.

  • Ashok Academy, a renowned school, is just 0.11 km away, making it an ideal choice for families with children.
  • Gandhi Nursing Home, a trusted medical facility, is 0.18 km away, ensuring timely medical attention in case of an emergency.
  • Versova Metro Station, a key city connection, is 1.38 km away, providing a convenient link to the city.
  • The Empresa Hotel, a stylish hotel, is 0.52 km away, perfect for guests and visitors.
  • Citi Mall, a popular shopping center, is 0.41 km away, offering a range of shopping and dining options.
  • Idea Square Business Center, a thriving business hub, is 0.48 km away, providing a hub for business and entrepreneurship.

For rent you can check 61 properties having options for 2 BHK - 4 BHK with price ranging from 90000 - 3.00 L.

Govt. Registered Recent Transactions

Recently, the real estate market has witnessed significant activity with multiple government-registered transactions taking place across various aggregations. Over the past three months, the rental rate has remained steady at 112.876, while the current rate sits at 54,858. developer.description:
The Runwal Group was founded in the year 1978 by its Chairman Subhash Runwal. Runwal Developers is one of the biggest real estate players in Mumbai today. Runwal Builders has also diversified into other market segments like retail. The Group is synonymous with quality, construction excellence and customer centricity.

The portfolio of Runwal projects includes more than 65 landmark projects including iconic offerings in micro markets like Thane, Ghatkopar, Mulund and Chembur. All Runwal properties are built on a simple yet effective premise, i.e. developing elegant and functional homes with reasonable speed. Delivering a total value proposition to the customer is what the Group strives for at all times. The Group is one of the pioneers when it comes to after sales property management and maintenance and long term customer associations.

The Group is also a preferred developer of the Maharashtra Government and enjoys huge brand equity and goodwill at present. The Group is currently considering projects in new and untapped locations in and around Mumbai and also in other cities. It aims at being the market leader in Mumbai with regard to homes with distinct value propositions for customers. The visionary and futuristic outlook of the Group has helped it adapt to changing trends and serve customers accordingly.

Why Runwal?

All Runwal residential projects are delivered on time and are built with reasonable speed. The Group believes in the right mix of functionality and aesthetics. Distinct value propositions are offered to customers and investors at every project. The Group is one of the pioneers when it comes to after sales property management and maintenance and this is one of its strong points as well. The Group believes in setting new benchmarks that adhere to global standards in terms of customer relations, construction technology and overall value addition.

The Group works on high quality lifestyle projects and is known for its design and architectural expertise, transparency and top class customer service. The Group has its own elite architecture and technical panel in addition to skilled and reputed planning and technical engineers and landscape designers on board.

Major Projects:

  • Runwal Elegante- Situated at Lokhandwala in Andheri West, this project offers premium lifestyles and strategic connectivity to residents coupled with top notch amenities and facilities

images.name: Master Plan Image 7
images.description:
Wadhwa Nest Wing B consists of two main residential building structures as depicted in the master plan.

Land Use & Density

This master plan shows a residential development featuring two building structures, integrated with green open spaces. The property is directly adjacent to and borders the large BHAVAN'S COLLEGE CAMPUS to the south and east.

Connectivity & Access
  • The property's northern boundary is along AD. Narayanrao Sakharam Chavan Road.
  • The western side of the property is adjacent to Kashibai Mahadeo Parab Road.
  • An Existing Road forms part of the eastern boundary, also providing access to Bhavan's College Campus, which has a visible gate.
  • A 7.90 M Wide Prop Road is depicted along the southern edge of the northern part of the development.
On-Site Features & Amenities
  • A swimming pool area is prominently featured next to one of the main residential buildings.
  • Extensive green landscaping and tree planting are visible throughout the development, including a central courtyard area within one of the building clusters.
  • The master plan indicates a future development area labeled 'PHASE - II'.
  • Adjacent structures like 'COLLEGE BLDG' and 'REHIS BLDG' are shown within the Bhavan's College Campus.
Key Dimensions & Figures
  • A dedicated 7.90 M Wide Prop Road is part of the development's infrastructure.
  • The project is identified as 'PHASE - II'.
  • The property shares a boundary with the BHAVAN'S COLLEGE CAMPUS.
  • The overall layout is branded with 'square yards,' suggesting a focus on land measurement.

developer.name: The Wadhwa Group
developer.description:
The Wadhwa Group has built a solid reputation for quality, trust, efficiency, premium amenities and cutting edge design over the last 45 years. The Wadhwa Developers is one of Mumbai’s top real estate companies and is known for its huge customer base.

The portfolio of The Wadhwa properties encompasses landmark residential projects, commercial spaces, hotels, shopping malls, IT parks and multiplexes. The Group has contributed hugely to the transformation of Mumbai’s skyline. The tally of The Wadhwa projects cumulatively covers 10 million sq. ft. and the Group has more than 10, 000 happy families under its belt till date with more than 100 landmarks built.

Why The Wadhwa?

All The Wadhwa residential projects are executed with the help of the best architects, designers and contractors. The Group seeks to understand client needs extensively prior to planning projects. All its projects are designed to be in communion with nature. Louver glass is often used for allowing sunlight into the home without harsh sunrays. Climatology is incorporated into development at the Group. Luxury is a priority for the Group and no compromises are made on this aspect along with overall customer comfort.

The Group chooses prime locations within Mumbai city limits and rapidly emerging growth corridors in and around the Mumbai suburbs for its projects. The Group has a solid track record of timely project completion and takes a litigation free approach to things. The Group is known for thoroughly researched concept planning with direct promoter involvement. The Group has thousands of happy families and corporate tenants under its belt and enjoys a high reputation for quality and reliability. The Group is known for its professionalism and skilled team of engineers, project management and customer service personnel who ensure the smooth running of every department.

Major Projects

There are several landmark projects built by the Group over the years and the list also includes several The Wadhwa upcoming projects. Here’s taking a look at some of them:

  • Promenade- This ultra luxury project is part of The Address flagship endeavor and comes with premium residences for discerning customers at Ghatkopar in Mumbai. The project comes with premium amenities for residents including a squash court, swimming pools, club house, well equipped gymnasium and a cr??che. The project also comes with specially designed Nakshatra Gardens for greater spiritual well being in addition to an open air Jacuzzi, Wi-Fi connectivity and car washing facilities among others

Connectivity & Access
  • The project is accessible from Kashibai Mahadeo Parab Road on its western side.

On-Site Features & Amenities

  • One residential block encloses a central green courtyard.

developer.name: Godrej
developer.description:
Godrej Properties is a name to reckon with in the realty and construction industry in India. The company is a part of the Godrej Group, one of India’s biggest and most trusted business conglomerates with interests in real estate, consumer goods, agribusinesses, appliances, locks and security solutions and many other verticals. Godrej Developers harnesses this 119 year old legacy of trust and excellence and emphasizes on top class technology and design for its projects.

Godrej Realty is known for its focus on sustainability and innovation. The list of Godrej projects includes multiple residential, township and commercial projects. The company is currently developing 115 million sq. ft. of projects in 12 Indian cities. The company has received in excess of 150 recognitions and awards and aims at being one of the top three developers in the nation. The company recently partnered with APG for setting up a $275 million fund to expand its real estate interests while the parent Group has also earmarked INR 1, 900 crore as a realty fund.

Why Godrej?

All Godrej residential projects come with immense brand value and are symbolic of trust, reliability and integrity. The company successfully leverages resources of its parent Group and has properly structured systems for T&D, HR, Planning, Marketing and Finance. The company believes in transparency and adherence to all industry regulations. The company has top notch processes and works with the latest technologies including Concerto and SAP in addition to possessing a skilled professional team for working on projects.

The company adheres to the highest quality standards in terms of project execution, services and materials. Customer requirements are neatly integrated into designs and layouts while the company also prides itself on its project management capabilities. The company makes use of CCPM and other innovations for delivering projects faster and works with leading architects and other industry experts for its projects.

Major Projects:

  • Godrej Sky Garden- Located near the Panvel railway station and NH-4 in Mumbai, this project offers a double height garden and landscaped garden in addition to premium apartments and amenities like a mini shopping complex, swimming pool and more
  • Godrej Sky- Located at Byculla, one of Mumbai’s best connected and most strategically situated areas, the project offers luxurious apartments furnished by the best and globally renowned brands in addition to gorgeous panoramic views, state of the art facilities and premium amenities. An IGBC certified green project, Sky comes with several environment friendly measures
  • Godrej Azure- Located at OMR, Chennai, Azure offers spacious and luxurious interiors in addition to delightful sea views and premium amenities and facilities. With social spaces and beautiful gardens dotting the project, there’s a lot in store for residents
  • Godrej Infinity- This premium project offers 270 degree open views in homes along with large balconies. With 70% open spaces, lush natural greenery, club concierge services, home automation facilities, spa services and sports academy, this project takes the cake when it comes to recreation and indulgence alike. This is located at Keshavnagar in Pune

The company successfully leverages resources of its parent Group and has properly structured systems for T&D, HR, Planning, Marketing and Finance. The company believes in transparency and adherence to all industry regulations. The company has top notch processes and works with the latest technologies including Concerto and SAP in addition to possessing a skilled professional team for working on projects.

The company adheres to the highest quality standards in terms of project execution, services and materials. Customer requirements are neatly integrated into designs and layouts while the company also prides itself on its project management capabilities. The company makes use of CCPM and other innovations for delivering projects faster and works with leading architects and other industry experts for its projects.

Major Projects:

  • Godrej Sky Garden- Located near the Panvel railway station and NH-4 in Mumbai, this project offers a double height garden and landscaped garden in addition to premium apartments and amenities like a mini shopping complex, swimming pool and more
  • Godrej Sky- Located at Byculla, one of Mumbai’s best connected and most strategically situated areas, the project offers luxurious apartments furnished by the best and globally renowned brands in addition to gorgeous panoramic views, state of the art facilities and premium amenities. An IGBC certified green project, Sky comes with several environment friendly measures
  • Godrej Azure- Located at OMR, Chennai, Azure offers spacious and luxurious interiors in addition to delightful sea views and premium amenities and facilities. With social spaces and beautiful gardens dotting the project, there’s a lot in store for residents
  • Godrej Infinity- This premium project offers 270 degree open views in homes along with large balconies. With 70% open spaces, lush natural greenery, club concierge services, home automation facilities, spa services and sports academy, this project takes the cake when it comes to recreation and indulgence alike. This is located at Keshavnagar in Pune

topProjects.description:
This is Ajmera Beverly Hills and Royal Empire, a premier residential project located in the heart of Andheri West, a popular and upscale suburb in Mumbai. The project offers unmatched connectivity, with New Link Road, Swami Vivekanand Road, and Western Express Highway just a stone ' s throw away, making it an ideal destination for those who value convenience and are looking for a hassle-free commute.

Designed to redefine the concept of luxury living, Ajmera Beverly Hills and Royal Empire boasts of state-of-the-art amenities and specifications that redefine the norms of comfort and elegance. From a well-equipped gymnasium to reliable power backup, every aspect of the project has been designed to provide its residents with a luxurious and secure living experience. With its prime location, top-notch amenities, and high-quality construction, this project is sure to appeal to even the most discerning buyers.

At Ajmera Beverly Hills and Royal Empire, you have a choice to make between two meticulously designed unit options - 2 BHK and 3 BHK apartments. Spacious and elegantly designed, these homes offer residents ample space tolive, relax, and entertain. So, why wait? Come and experience the epitome of luxury living at Ajmera Beverly Hills and Royal Empire.

developer.name: Ajmera
developer.description:
Ajmera Developers is one of the country’s most reputed and leading real estate companies and has experience of 47 years and the Ajmera Group has also diversified into other segments like vaults security, solar power, cement, sports and social welfare.

The portfolio of Ajmera properties includes several projects in and around Mumbai in addition to Pune, Surat, Ahmedabad, Bangalore and Rajkot in addition to a global project at Bahrain. Ajmera Builders believes in innovation, quality, aesthetic appeal and comfort and has transformed into a major realty conglomerate in recent times.

Why Ajmera?

All Ajmera residential projects are developed by leading engineers and architects along with skilled professionals. The Group believes in core values like trust, integrity, transparency, aesthetic appeal, design excellence, functionality, comfort and customer satisfaction. The latter aspect is taken very seriously by the Group.

The Group focuses on sustainable development and believes in trust, goodwill and long lasting customer relationships. The Group offers housing solutions for almost market segment. The Group offers world class housing propositions for customers at comparatively affordable and reasonable rates. The Group offers spacious housing solutions to customers along with premium amenities and facilities. The Group emphasizes hugely on project quality and adheres to stringent quality standards. The Group believes in seamless project execution and seeks to offer greater value propositions to its customers.

Why Ajmera?

There are several Ajmera projects that have become landmarks in their own right over the years and this tally also includes multiple Ajmera upcoming projects. A few of these are listed below:

  • Ajmera Aeon- This premium project goes up to 49 storeys and offers premium 2, 3 and 4 BHK homes to buyers along with cutting edge contemporary amenities and facilities. The project has been planned by Singapore based Space Matrix architects. The project offers diverse facilities, clean renewable energy, the latest technological advancements and single access control for multiple facilities. This luxuriously designed project is located at Bhakti Park in Wadala
  • New Era- This project offers luxuriously designed 1 and 2 BHK new generation homes along with a nature friendly and pollution free living ambience. The pristine and lush green landscapes promise a visual treat while there are 18 storey towers containing almost all contemporary conveniences that you can think of
  • Ajmera Villows- This novel residential project at Bangalore offers breath taking Mexican design inspired villas along with exclusive facilities and other amenities. The project comes with spectacular interiors, innovative and supremely functional floor plans, high ceilings and grand layouts. The project offers amenities like a fitness and spa centre, lounge, polyclinic, library, garden terrace, tennis and basketball courts, skating rink, jogging track, mini golf, swimming pool, cricket pitch and many more

developer.name: Oberoi Realty
developer.description:
Oberoi Realty is one of the country’s biggest and most reputed developers. The company is always on a quest to ensure vibrant and fulfilling relationships between spaces and their occupants. The company began its journey almost three decades earlier with a view towards redefining housing solutions for customers at par with the best global parameters when the paradigm shift in Mumbai from the southern island towards the suburbs took place.

The portfolio of Oberoi Realty properties encompasses more than 39 projects at strategic locations in Mumbai which cumulatively comprise approximately 9.18 million sq. ft. The company is presently developing another 20.61 million sq. ft. in various parts of Mumbai and other regions. The company has always adhered to high quality design parameters for its projects and several of them have contributed immensely towards transforming the Mumbai skyline.

Why Oberoi Realty?

The company is known for its insistence on innovation and contemporary architecture in addition to top class project execution and quality construction. The company partners with the best in the country and the world and has always stayed abreast of evolving national and global trends in the industry. The company outsources work to leading global and domestic consultants in architecture, engineering, design and construction to accomplish the scalability required for undertaking mega projects.

The company makes use of the latest technologies for project development and believes in core values like transparency, trust and reliability. The company delivers projects on time and strives to create living spaces that enhance quality of life overall. The company is committed towards offering futuristic and revolutionary offerings which are ahead of their time and benchmarked against global practices and trends. The company aims at offering the perfect solutions to discerning customers and follows top class quality systems and processes. Customer centricity is taken very seriously at the company along with teamwork, innovation, honesty, accountability and its I Connect philosophy where open and transparent communication amongst stakeholders and customers is encouraged.

Major Projects

There are several landmark Oberoi Realty projects built over the years and here’s taking a look at some of them:

  • Priviera- This ultra luxurious and landmark project offers boutique privileges and comfort at one of the poshest residential locations in Mumbai. The project has been designed by the renowned Guz Architects form Singapore and the structural design has been taken care of by Meinhardt, an award winning firm from Singapore. The project is located in close proximity to the Arabian Sea and the domestic and international airports. The project comes with a rooftop infinity pool, gorgeous views of the Arabian Sea, a complete floor dedicated to every apartment, multiple parking levels and car lifts, 360 degree air and light ventilation and a show flat designed by Sussanne Khan and her Charcoal Project
  • Prisma- This landmark project offers spacious and beautifully designed 4 BHK apartments with spacious balconies to residents. The project comes with impeccable landscaping and lies along the Jogeshwari-Vikhroli Link Road. The project offers easy access to the Western Express Highway and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents
  • Oberoi Woods- This premium residential project is located at Goregaon East off the Western Express Highway and spreads over 80 acres in all. The project offers nature friendly layouts to residents along with gorgeous views of the Aarey greens. The project is characteristic of exquisite finishing, the very best and innovative construction techniques and contemporary designs and layouts

topProjects.seoDescription:
Oberoi Springs, located in the heart of Andheri West, presents a unique opportunity to own a stylish and sophisticated address. Nestled within close proximity to the vibrant Western Express Highway, this project promises seamless connectivity to major commercial and entertainment hubs in the city.

Designed to provide a luxurious and comfortable living experience, Oberoi Springs features a range of world-class amenities, including a well-equipped gymnasium and a reliable power backup system. The carefully crafted spaces are designed to cater to the needs of the modern smart home, offering the perfect blend of style, comfort, and functionality. From the carefully selected finishes to the attention to detail, every aspect of Oberoi Springs is tailored to meet the expectations of discerning homebuyers.

At Oberoi Springs, the focus is on creating a safe and secure environment that fosters a sense of community and belonging. With its strategic location, world-class amenities, and attention to detail, Oberoi Springs is an ideal choice for those seeking a comfortable and convenient living experience in the heart of Andheri West.

Available Unit Options

The following table outlines the available unit options at Oberoi Springs:

2 BHK Apartment 986 On Request

Nearby Landmarks

The residential property is strategically located near several notable landmarks, providing residents with easy access to essential amenities and services. These landmarks not only enhance the quality of life for residents but also offer a unique blend of convenience and comfort.

  • Interiors And More is a school located just 0.47 away from the project.
  • SBS Hospital is situated at a distance of 0.29 away, ensuring timely medical attention in case of an emergency.
  • Hotel West Blue is just 0.21 away, perfect for guests and visitors.
  • Citi Mall, a shopping center, is located 0.34 away from the project, offering a range of shopping and dining options.
  • Idea Square Business Center, a major business hub, is 0.22 away, offering opportunities for entrepreneurship and networking.

developer.name: Oberoi Realty
developer.description:
Oberoi Realty is one of the country’s biggest and most reputed developers. The company is always on a quest to ensure vibrant and fulfilling relationships between spaces and their occupants. The company began its journey almost three decades earlier with a view towards redefining housing solutions for customers at par with the best global parameters when the paradigm shift in Mumbai from the southern island towards the suburbs took place.

The portfolio of Oberoi Realty properties encompasses more than 39 projects at strategic locations in Mumbai which cumulatively comprise approximately 9.18 million sq. ft. The company is presently developing another 20.61 million sq. ft. in various parts of Mumbai and other regions. The company has always adhered to high quality design parameters for its projects and several of them have contributed immensely towards transforming the Mumbai skyline.

Why Oberoi Realty?

The company is known for its insistence on innovation and contemporary architecture in addition to top class project execution and quality construction. The company partners with the best in the country and the world and has always stayed abreast of evolving national and global trends in the industry. The company outsources work to leading global and domestic consultants in architecture, engineering, design and construction to accomplish the scalability required for undertaking mega projects.

The company makes use of the latest technologies for project development and believes in core values like transparency, trust and reliability. The company delivers projects on time and strives to create living spaces that enhance quality of life overall. The company is committed towards offering futuristic and revolutionary offerings which are ahead of their time and benchmarked against global practices and trends. The company aims at offering the perfect solutions to discerning customers and follows top class quality systems and processes. Customer centricity is taken very seriously at the company along with teamwork, innovation, honesty, accountability and its I Connect philosophy where open and transparent communication amongst stakeholders and customers is encouraged.

Major Projects

There are several landmark Oberoi Realty projects built over the years and here’s taking a look at some of them:

  • Priviera- This ultra luxurious and landmark project offers boutique privileges and comfort at one of the poshest residential locations in Mumbai. The project has been designed by the renowned Guz Architects form Singapore and the structural design has been taken care of by Meinhardt, an award winning firm from Singapore. The project is located in close proximity to the Arabian Sea and the domestic and international airports. The project comes with a rooftop infinity pool, gorgeous views of the Arabian Sea, a complete floor dedicated to every apartment, multiple parking levels and car lifts, 360 degree air and light ventilation and a show flat designed by Sussanne Khan and her Charcoal Project
  • Prisma- This landmark project offers spacious and beautifully designed 4 BHK apartments with spacious balconies to residents. The project comes with impeccable landscaping and lies along the Jogeshwari-Vikhroli Link Road. The project offers easy access to the Western Express Highway and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents
  • Oberoi Woods- This premium residential project is located at Goregaon East off the Western Express Highway and spreads over 80 acres in all. The project offers nature friendly layouts to residents along with gorgeous views of the Aarey greens. The project is characteristic of exquisite finishing, the very best and innovative construction techniques and contemporary designs and layouts

images.name: Master Plan Image 4
images.description:
This is the ground floor master plan for Oberoi Sky Gardens, located in Andheri West. The plan details the common facilities and access points available on this ground level. Specific details regarding total land area, number of units, or project launch and completion dates are not visible on this plan.

Land Use & Density

The plan clearly designates zones for recreational amenities, essential services, and extensive open green spaces that frame the central facility area. Internal circulation is primarily managed through designated fire driveways. No specific land use percentages or density figures are indicated on this plan.

developer.name: Oberoi Realty
developer.description:
Oberoi Realty is one of the country’s biggest and most reputed developers. The company is always on a quest to ensure vibrant and fulfilling relationships between spaces and their occupants. The company began its journey almost three decades earlier with a view towards redefining housing solutions for customers at par with the best global parameters when the paradigm shift in Mumbai from the southern island towards the suburbs took place.

The portfolio of Oberoi Realty properties encompasses more than 39 projects at strategic locations in Mumbai which cumulatively comprise approximately 9.18 million sq. ft. The company is presently developing another 20.61 million sq. ft. in various parts of Mumbai and other regions. The company has always adhered to high quality design parameters for its projects and several of them have contributed immensely towards transforming the Mumbai skyline.

Why Oberoi Realty?

The company is known for its insistence on innovation and contemporary architecture in addition to top class project execution and quality construction. The company partners with the best in the country and the world and has always stayed abreast of evolving national and global trends in the industry. The company outsources work to leading global and domestic consultants in architecture, engineering, design and construction to accomplish the scalability required for undertaking mega projects.

The company makes use of the latest technologies for project development and believes in core values like transparency, trust and reliability. The company delivers projects on time and strives to create living spaces that enhance quality of life overall. The company is committed towards offering futuristic and revolutionary offerings which are ahead of their time and benchmarked against global practices and trends. The company aims at offering the perfect solutions to discerning customers and follows top class quality systems and processes. Customer centricity is taken very seriously at the company along with teamwork, innovation, honesty, accountability and its I Connect philosophy where open and transparent communication amongst stakeholders and customers is encouraged.

Major Projects

There are several landmark Oberoi Realty projects built over the years and here’s taking a look at some of them:

  • Priviera- This ultra luxurious and landmark project offers boutique privileges and comfort at one of the poshest residential locations in Mumbai. The project has been designed by the renowned Guz Architects form Singapore and the structural design has been taken care of by Meinhardt, an award winning firm from Singapore. The project is located in close proximity to the Arabian Sea and the domestic and international airports. The project comes with a rooftop infinity pool, gorgeous views of the Arabian Sea, a complete floor dedicated to every apartment, multiple parking levels and car lifts, 360 degree air and light ventilation and a show flat designed by Sussanne Khan and her Charcoal Project
  • Prisma- This landmark project offers spacious and beautifully designed 4 BHK apartments with spacious balconies to residents. The project comes with impeccable landscaping and lies along the Jogeshwari-Vikhroli Link Road. The project offers easy access to the Western Express Highway and offers premium amenities and facilities to residents
  • Oberoi Woods- This premium residential project is located at Goregaon East off the Western Express Highway and spreads over 80 acres in all. The project offers nature friendly layouts to residents along with gorgeous views of the Aarey greens. The project is characteristic of exquisite finishing, the very best and innovative construction techniques and contemporary designs and layouts

developer.name: Sunteck
developer.description: Sunteck Realty Limited (SRL) is based in Mumbai and is one of the biggest realty players across luxury and ultra luxury residential categories. The portfolio of Sunteck projects encompasses approximately 23 million sq. ft. throughout 25 projects in various developmental stages in tandem with four rental assets. It has also developed 6 projects covering 2 million sq. ft. over the last four years and this covers both residential and commercial segments. Project execution skills are a major forte coupled with efficient project management. There are several strategic tie-ups with globally renowned architects, engineers, brand partners and contractors. Brands like L&T, Walt Disney, Talathy & Panthaky Associates are some partners of the company. There is a flagship offering spread across 1.5 million at Bandra Kurla Complex, Mumbai’s new CBD. This encompasses three premium properties, namely Signature Island, Signia Pearl and Signia Isles. There are other big ticket properties including a 23 acre mixed use development at Goregaon West as part of Sunteck City along with 81 acres in Jaipur, properties at Mulund, Sion, Navi Mumbai and offerings in Goa and Nagpur.

cmsContent.localityContent:
Andheri West is a lively suburb in Mumbai, located in the Western Suburbs belt of the city in the state of Maharashtra. It is a busy mix of residential housing, commercial complexes, film and television studios, cafés and local markets, all linked by the Western Express Highway and the metro network. The postal pin is 400058. Out of 999 localities in the city, it ranks 141. People living here usually give it about 4.3 on average.


Currently, there are around 18 new projects, which are fresh launches, while 81 are still under construction. The locality has approximately 1092 ready-to-move properties.


Property options are varied. There are 4 types of properties available for sale: 823 apartments, 35 industrial plots, 5 residential plots, and 51 office spaces. Around 730 are up for sale. If renting is the plan, there are 2,768 choices listed.


Prices show some spread. The average sale price in this area is approximately ₹29,650/sq.ft. Some homes sell for less, while others sell for more, typically falling within the ₹20.5k/sq.ft to ₹39K/sq. ft. range. Rental values are different. In the locality, 1 BHK to 3 BHK units are priced around an average rent of ₹83 per sq ft.


Infrastructure, Connectivity & Transport


Getting around Andheri West is straightforward. People take metros, buses, autos, and local trains every day. DN Nagar, Versova, and Azad Nagar stations are the nearest, and most can walk there in a few minutes.


Andheri Railway Station is another option. From here, trains head across Mumbai without much hassle. Roads are busy but still useful. SV Road and Link Road run through the area, often packed with taxis and private cars. Many prefer the Western Express Highway for longer trips.


The airport is close enough. Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International can be reached in 20 minutes by car, or closer to half an hour when traffic builds up. Four Bungalows and Andheri Depot are the most used bus stops.


Shops, schools, and small medical stores sit nearby. Cafes too. Peak hours bring jams, but locals usually manage by adjusting their travel time.


How do People Rate Andheri West?


Andheri West has positive feedback across key areas. The lifestyle rating stands at 4.2 out of 5, reflecting the active social life, nearby gyms, and shopping options. For livability, the area scores 4.3 out of 5, which covers general safety, cleanliness, and neighbourhood feel.


Connectivity receives a rating of 4.1 out of 5 due to its proximity to metro access, SV Road, and the Western Express Highway. Health and education also rank well, with a score of 4.3 out of 5, showing the presence of trusted schools and hospitals in and around the area.


Leading developers such as Rustomjee, Raheja, and Oberoi have launched projects here. The area offers homes in various BHK configurations, including 238 1BHK, 26 1RK, 27 1.5BHK, 336 2BHK, 179 3BHK, and 18 4BHK.


Distance to Nearby Localities/Important Places


Nearby Localities

Distance

Andheri West to Andheri East 

6.3 km

Andheri West to Malad

7.4 km

Andheri West to Goregaon

6.5 km

Andheri West to Juhu Beach

5.1 km

Andheri West to Chatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Airport

8.9 km

Market Trends & Investment Potential


In Andheri West, sale prices usually hover around ₹ 29,650/sq.ft. Not every deal matches that figure. Properties for sale are somewhere between ₹ 20.5k/sq.ft to ₹ 39K/sq.ft, depending on the society and location.


Rents tell their own story. On average, tenants spend about ₹83 per sq ft, but the actual amounts vary. Most fall between ₹ 27.1K and ₹ 3.8L, though better buildings and larger flats can push the price higher.


Records from the authorities show 3,383 registrations from December 24 to November 25. Together, these deals totalled 5,819 Cr in value. The average registration rate is ₹ 19,900 / sq. ft.


Buyers here are most drawn to apartments. For rentals, the most significant supply is in 2BHK units, which suit many tenants. Resale is part of the picture, too. About 979 such listings are currently available, offering additional choices for individuals looking to buy or invest.

locality_summary.headline: Andheri West: Lively, Connected, Chaotic, Pricey
locality_summary.overall_summary: Andheri West is a vibrant and well-connected Mumbai locality, favored for its entertainment options, proximity to media hubs, and excellent transport links including the Metro, railway, and highways. However, it struggles with persistent traffic congestion, waterlogging during monsoons, and high living costs. The area offers a bustling urban lifestyle but faces challenges in infrastructure and affordability.
top_highlights: Proximity to media and film industry
Access to good hospitals and educational institutions
Convenient shopping malls and markets (Lokhandwala, Infiniti)
watchouts_or_gaps: Severe traffic congestion, especially during peak hours
Lack of parking spaces and poor waste management in some areas
best_for: Young professionals in media and entertainment
Individuals seeking a lively urban lifestyle
not_ideal_for: Individuals seeking a peaceful, quiet environment
evidence_notes: "I love how it makes me feel like staying in an exclusive area, with so many movie and television celebrities staying here."
"The Metro and the Link Road help to simplify travel. Although rather costly, it's rather worth it."
"The traffic is becoming a nightmare, and so many people are crowding the area."
